1000606010.english: Alright!! Everyone, can you look over here?

1000606011.english: - Triaina's clear shout echoed across the beach, and the murmuring ceased.
1000606011.korean: - 트리아이나의 맑은 외침이 해변으로 울려 퍼지고, 웅성거림이 멎었다.

1000606012.english: Hello, submarine friends! My name is Triaina. Please call me the 'Explorer' from the Golden Workers.
1000606012.korean: 잠수함 친구들! 모두 안녕? 내 이름은 트리아이나.&n골든 워커즈 출신의 '탐험가'라고 불러줘.

1000606013.english: That's all for my introduction. Let's get straight to the point!
1000606013.korean: 내 소개는 여기까지 하고, 본론부터 이야기할게!

1000606014.english: To my friends, this might look like an ordinary uninhabited island, but it is an island where Black River's treasure is hidden.
1000606014.korean: 친구들이 보기에, 여긴 평범한 무인도처럼 보일지 몰라도,&n여긴 블랙리버의 보물이 숨겨져 있는 섬이야.

1000606015.english: Countless hunters have tried to find treasure so far, but we are the only ones who have safely reached this island.
1000606015.korean: 지금까지 수많은 헌터들이 보물을 찾으려 했었지만,&n무사히 이 섬까지 도착한 사람은 우리들뿐이야.

1000606016.english: - I could see some of the people looking at Triaina suddenly startled. They probably... roughly realized the situation they were in.
1000606016.korean: - 트리아이나를 쳐다보던 인원 중 몇몇이, 화들짝 놀라는 게 보였다.&n아마도... 자신들이 처한 상황을 대충 눈치챈 것이겠지.

1000606017.english: Oh! Look at this! I told you, there are some friends with good instincts! You're right. We're starting our treasure hunt today!
1000606017.korean: 오! 이것 봐! 감이 좋은 친구들도 있다니까?&n지금 생각하는 그게 맞아. 우린 오늘부터 트레저 헌팅을 시작 하는 거야!

1000606018.english: I've received permission from the Commander of Orca, so please take care of me, everyone! That's all from 'The Greatest Deep Sea Adventurer Produced by PECS'~!
1000606018.korean: 오르카의 사령관님의 허락도 떨어졌으니까. 다들 잘 부탁해!&n이상, '펙스가 배출한 최고의 심해 모험가'였습니다~!

1000606019.english: - Unexpectedly, the reaction from the Orca members was enthusiastic.

1000606020.english: - While there are people running along the beach holding hands with colleagues, filled with a sense of liberation and anticipation.
1000606020.korean: - 해방감, 기대감으로 동료의 손을 잡고 해변을 질주하는 인원들이 있는 반면.

1000606021.english: - There were also people who kept sighing and glancing at me. A treasure hunt... do they think I'm an idiot?
1000606021.korean: - 연신 한숨을 쉬며, 나를 힐끗힐끗 쳐다보는 인원들도 있었다.&n보물 사냥이라니... 바보라고 생각하는 걸까?

1000606022.english: Hey there! Soldier friends? Don't go too far! This is an island swarming with Iron Bugs!
1000606022.korean: 거기~! 군인 친구들? 너무 멀리 가면 안 돼! 여긴 철충들이 득실거리는 섬이라구!

1000606023.english: Whoa!! Did I not hear that properly?

1000606024.english: Aargh! There are Iron Bugs in the front!!

1000606025.english: Aaaargh! Why are there Iron Bugs on a deserted island?!

1000606026.english: Hehe. I think it's Captain's turn to put in some effort now. You think so too, right?
1000606026.korean: 헤헤. 이제 캡틴이 힘 좀 써줄 차례인 것 같은데?&n캡틴도 그렇게 생각하지?

1000606027.english: - Triaina remained defiant. Had she forgotten that she was the one making the request? I was about to add a comment, but instead, I smiled faintly.
1000606027.korean: - 트리아이나는 여전히 당당했다. 부탁하는 처지임을 잊은 걸까?&n나는 한마디 덧붙이려다, 작게 웃는 것으로 대신했다.

1000606028.english: See? I was right! You're the best, Captain! I'll step aside for a bit. Thanks, Captain.
1000606028.korean: 그것 봐. 내 감이 맞았어! 캡틴은 정말 최고야!&n난 잠깐 피해있을게, 고마워 캡틴.

1000606029.english: - It seems there are Iron Bugs on this island.
1000606029.korean: - 아무래도 이 섬엔 철충이 있는 듯하다.

1000606030.english: - There is no way the Iron bug crossed the sea, so it must have fallen from the sky in the first place.
1000606030.korean: - 철충이 바다를 건넜을 리는 없으니 처음부터 하늘에서 떨어진 철충이겠지.

1000606031.english: - It shouldn't be that dangerous. At least there's no way the Iron Bugs will be replenished. Let's get rid of them quickly and enjoy a happy summer.
1000606031.korean: - 그리 위험하진 않을 것이다. 적어도 철충이 보충될 리는 없을 테니까.&n얼른 처치해 버리고, 해피한 여름을 즐겨보자.

1000606032.english: What?! You already finished it? Really? That's amazing!
1000606032.korean: 뭐?! 벌써 해치운 거야? 진짜? 대단해!

1000606033.english: - Upon hearing Triaina's praise, something inside me began to puff up.
1000606033.korean: - 트리아이나의 칭찬을 듣자, 내 안의 무언가가 우쭐거리기 시작했다.

1000606034.english: I was a little worried that the Captain might get taken down by the Iron bug, but... this is the true power of the Captain...
1000606034.korean: 캡틴이 철충에게 당하진 않을까 싶어서, 조금 걱정했는데.&n이게 진짜 캡틴의 위력이구나...

1000606035.english: I'll admit it! The Captain is a real Captain.

1000606036.english: - It seems the urgent situation is resolved. Now, the remaining work is...
1000606036.korean: - 급한 상황은 해결한 것 같다, 이제 남은 일이...

1000606038.english: Constantia has never broken a promise she made to me. At the very least, I believe there is no one more suitable than Constantia as an adjutant.
1000606038.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 나와 한 약속을 어긴 적이 없다.&n적어도 부관으로는 콘스탄챠 만한 적임자가 없다고 생각한다.

1000606039.english: I will report back. As ordered by Master, all of Orca's forces are currently maintaining only a low level of alert.
1000606039.korean: 보고드릴게요. 주인님이 명령하신 대로, 현재 오르카의 병력들은 모두&n낮은 수준의 경계 태세만 갖추고 있어요.

1000606040.english: We will do our best so that you won't have to worry, Master.
1000606040.korean: 주인님이 걱정하지 않도록, 저희가 최선을 다할게요.

1000606041.english: Yes, Master. I hope you have a pleasant vacation...

1000606042.english: Uh... Captain? What do you mean by vacation?
1000606042.korean: 어... 캡틴? 휴가라니 그게 무슨 말이야?

1000606043.english: Hmm. Really? If the Captain doesn't want to tell me, then it can't be helped.
1000606043.korean: 음~. 그래? 캡틴이 알려주기 싫다면, 어쩔 수 없지.

1000606044.english: Oh! Right! You remembered? The Captain said he would support the exploration team. Do you remember?
1000606044.korean: 오! 맞아! 기억하고 있었네?&n캡틴이 내게 탐사 대원들을 지원해준다고 했었잖아. 기억나?

1000606045.english: Ugh... Really? That's unbelievable, Captain. We came all this way, and it was all a lie? Captain, I'm so disappointed...
1000606045.korean: 어우... 정말? 말도 안 돼 캡틴. 여기까지 왔는데 다 뻥이야?&n캡틴, 대실망...

1000606046.english: - If you answer Triaina carelessly, you’ll end up like this in no time. If you don’t focus on the conversation, you might end up making a promise to her that you can’t keep...
1000606046.korean: - 트리아이나의 말에 건성건성 대답하다가는, 금방 이런 꼴이 된다.&n대화에 집중하지 않으면, 그녀와 지키지도 못할 약속을 해 버릴지도...

1000606047.english: Hey, Captain? How long do I have to wait? 3 minutes? 4 minutes?
1000606047.korean: 저기~ 캡틴? 나 얼마나 기다려야 돼? 3분? 4분?

1000606048.english: - Definitely. It would be best to accept Triaina's request.
1000606048.korean: - 확실히. 트리아이나의 요청은 받아 주는 게 좋겠지.

1000606049.english: - Even though she looks so confident, having lived a life far removed from combat, even dealing with low-level Iron bugs must be a burden for Triaina.
1000606049.korean: - 저렇게 자신만만해 보여도, 여태 전투와 거리가 먼 생활을 해 왔으니,&n하급 철충을 상대하는 것조차, 트리아이나 입장에서는 부담스러운 일일 테지.

1000606050.english: - Fortunately, the reinforcements have already been decided.
1000606050.korean: - 다행히도, 지원 병력은 이미 결정해 둔 상태.

1000606051.english: Hehe~ I wonder who I'll be going with? I'm looking forward to it~!
1000606051.korean: 헤헤~ 누구랑 같이 가게 될까? 기대된다~!

1000606052.english: - The Sirene, who had been surveying the island, walked over leaving small footprints.
1000606052.korean: - 섬을 살펴보던 세이렌이 작은 발자국을 남기며 걸어왔다.

1000606053.english: Yes. Did you call me, Commander?

1000606054.english: Kyaaa~! A Sirene? Really? Can I go with a Sirene?
1000606054.korean: 꺄아~! 세이렌이라고? 진짜? 세이렌이랑 같이 가도 돼?

1000606056.english: Does that mean... that I should join the treasure hunt?
1000606056.korean: 그 말씀은... 보물 사냥에 합류하라는 뜻인가요?

1000606057.english: Ah... do you mean useful items...

1000606058.english: - ... Sirene doesn't seem to have much interest.

1000606060.english: Ms. Triaina, please wait here. I'll be right back with the preparations.
1000606060.korean: 트리아이나씨는 여기서 대기해 주세요, 금방 준비해 올게요.

1000606061.english: Of course! If it's a Sirene, it's fine to take your time.

1000606062.english: - The admirable Sirene took on the mission maturely once again without a single complaint.
1000606062.korean: - 기특한 세이렌은 이번에도 불평 한마디 없이 의젓하게 임무를 맡았다.

1000606063.english: - However, it was pitiful to see her falter every now and then, overwhelmed by the missions she was assigned.
1000606063.korean: - 다만 가끔씩 맡은 임무가 버거워, 휘청거리는 모습이 안쓰러웠었지.

1000606064.english: I wanted to go with Sirene too. This works out really well. You know, isn't Sirene really cute for a soldier?
1000606064.korean: 나도 세이렌이랑 같이 가고 싶었는데. 정말 잘 됐다.&n있지, 세이렌은 군인 치고 정말 귀엽지 않아?

1000606065.english: - The reason for calling Horizon is simple.

1000606066.english: - I wanted Sirene to chat with her companions and have a fun time. In that sense, treasure hunting with her companions seemed like a pretty good adventure.
1000606066.korean: - 나는 세이렌이 동료들과 떠들고 즐거운 경험을 하길 바랬다.&n그런 면에서, 동료들 과의 트레저 헌팅은 꽤 괜찮은 모험처럼 보였다.

1000606067.english: - However, for it to be an enjoyable adventure for everyone, Triaina's thoughtful consideration will also be necessary.
1000606067.korean: - 다만, 모두가 즐거운 모험이 되기 위해선, 트리아이나의 세심한 배려도&n필요하겠지.

1000606068.english: Huh? A favor? Fine! Tell me anything. I'll do whatever you say no matter what. Because you're my benefactor.
1000606068.korean: 응? 부탁? 좋아! 뭐든 말해. 캡틴이 말하는 건 무조건 들어줄게.&n캡틴은 내 은인이니까.

1000606069.english: - Have fun playing with the Sirene. Laugh a lot, show her lots of fascinating things, and chatter loudly. Lastly, don't get hurt.
1000606069.korean: - 세이렌이랑 재밌게 놀다 와. 많이 웃고, 신기한 것 많이 보여주고,&n시끄럽게 떠들고 와. 마지막으로 다치면 안 돼.

1000606070.english: - I wanted to say that, but the words wouldn't come out easily. Where has my usual shamelessness gone?
1000606070.korean: - ... 라고 말하고 싶었지만, &n입이 쉽게 떨어지지 않는다. 평소의 뻔뻔함이 어디로 가버린 걸까?

1000606072.english: ... Are you okay? Did you pick up and eat something weird on the beach?
1000606072.korean: ... 괜찮아? 해변에서 이상한 거라도 주워 먹은 거 아냐?

1000606073.english: I can't hear you well. Are you really okay?

1000606074.english: Hahaha! What? You sound totally like an old man!

1000606075.english: Ah! Your captain is so much fun! Guys? Guys?
1000606075.korean: 아아! 너희 캡틴 완전 재밌어! 얘들아? 얘들아?

1000606076.english: - My head is spinning with this bewildering feeling I'm experiencing for the first time.
1000606076.korean: - 처음 느껴보는 당황스러운 기분에 머리가 복잡하다.

1000606077.english: - Why is it that I am more worried than when deploying Sirens into battle?
1000606077.korean: - 세이렌을 전투에 투입시킬 때 보다. 더 걱정이 되는 이유가 뭘까?

1000606078.english: - I saw off the Sirene as she set off on her journey, unable to find a suitable answer.
1000606078.korean: - 나는 적당한 답을 찾지 못한 채, 길을 떠나는 세이렌을 배웅해 주었다.

1000606079.english: Of course, if it's a deserted island, you have to build a base camp first!
1000606079.korean: 그야, 무인도라면 당연히 베이스캠프를 먼저 지어야지 말입니다!

1000606080.english: And, honestly, the connotation of "makeshift barracks" is a bit off.
1000606080.korean: 그리고, 솔직히 간이 막사는 어감이 좀 그렇지 말입니다.

1000606081.english: It doesn't matter what it is, just hurry up and move this together!
1000606081.korean: 뭐가 됐든 상관없으니까, 얼른 이것 좀 같이 옮겨요!

1000606082.english: Why are all those engineers standing by on Orca? I don't understand.
1000606082.korean: 그 많은 공병들이 어째서 전부 오르카에 대기 중인 거죠? 이해가 안 돼요.

1000606083.english: Wow! There really is nothing the Leprechaun Squad Leader can't do. In my opinion, not the squad leader, but the officer...
1000606083.korean: 햐~! 레프리콘 분대장님은 정말 못하는 게 없지 말입니다.&n제 생각에 분대장이 아니라, 장교는...

1000606085.english: Yes~! Brownie is on her way~.

1000606087.english: - Watching the members of Orca leisurely enjoying their vacation, a sense of satisfaction wells up from deep within me.
1000606087.korean: - 오르카의 인원들이 여유롭게 휴가를 즐기는 모습을 보고 있자니,&n내 몸 깊은 곳에서 만족감이 솟아난다.

1000606088.english: - This is 'Orca's Holiday' that I designed. The plan is falling into place one by one.
1000606088.korean: - 이것이 내가 설계한 '오르카의 휴일'. 계획이 하나씩 맞아떨어져 간다.

1000606089.english: - ... It must have been a perfect plan until the Doom Bringer commander appeared. Her throne looks even bigger today.
1000606089.korean: - ... 둠 브링어의 지휘관이 나타나기 전까지는 분명 완벽한 계획이었을 터.&n오늘따라 그녀의 옥좌가 더욱 커 보인다.

1000606090.english: - A look of displeasure. What reason will they come up with to torment me this time? I feel uneasy for some reason.
1000606090.korean: - 뭔가 마음에 들지 않는다는 표정. 이번엔 또 무슨 이유를 들어 나를 괴롭힐까?&n어쩐지 찝찝하다.

1000606091.english: Commander, may I ask you a question?
1000606091.korean: 사령관, 내가 질문 하나 해도 될까?

1000606092.english: Who on earth is the work of that shabby-looking base camp?
1000606092.korean: 저 하찮아 보이는 베이스캠프는 대체 누구 솜씨지?

1000606093.english: - Even May wouldn't be able to speak so arbitrarily in front of Marie.
1000606093.korean: - 아무리 메이라도 마리 앞에서 저렇게 멋대로 말하진 못하겠지.

1000606094.english: Haa... To blame your subordinates... I'm disappointed again, Commander.
1000606094.korean: 하아... 부하를 탓하다니, 이번에도 실망이야 사령관.

1000606095.english: Have you ever read a field manual by any chance? There is a book that explains everything in great detail, from supplies to garrison policies...
1000606095.korean: 혹시, 야전 교범 같은거 읽어본 적 있어?&n보급 품목부터, 주둔 방침까지 아주 상세하게 설명해 놓은 책이 있는데...

1000606096.english: Don't you realize how wrong your base camp location is right now? Well... I guess it can't be helped. I'll send you the correct location, so go study.
1000606096.korean: 지금 베이스캠프 위치가 얼마나 잘못됐는지 모르겠어?&n뭐... 하는 수 없지. 내가 올바른 위치를 보내줄 테니 공부하도록 해.

1000606097.english: - May sent me the coordinates with a haughty expression.
1000606097.korean: - 메이는 도도한 표정으로 내게 좌표를 송신했다.

1000606098.english: - The place May sent was right next to an area infested with Iron Bugs. It was a dangerous area at a glance.
1000606098.korean: - 메이가 보낸 곳은 철충이 출몰하는 지역 바로 옆이었다.&n한눈에 봐도 위험한 지역.

1000606099.english: You coward. Look. If the infantry tries to attack from where the commander is holding the position all the way here, they'll get exhausted first.
1000606099.korean: 이 겁쟁이. 봐. 사령관이 잡은 데서 여기까지 공격을 가려면&n보병들이 먼저 지쳐버릴걸?

1000606100.english: Tactics inherently involve taking some degree of risk.
1000606100.korean: 원래 전술이란 건 어느 정도 위험을 감수할 수밖에 없는 거야.

1000606101.english: - I am well aware that May is inherently belligerent. However, the position she desires is too dangerous.
1000606101.korean: - 본래 메이가 호전적이란 건 잘 알고 있다. &n하지만, 메이가 원하는 위치는 너무 위험하다.

1000606102.english: - That means... May wants something, right?
1000606102.korean: - 그 말은... 메이가 원하는 게 있다는 뜻이겠지?

1000606103.english: Oh! Commander! We can actually communicate! You've definitely improved since the beginning!
1000606103.korean: 오! 사령관! 말이 통하잖아?&n처음보다 확실히 발전했는데?

1000606104.english: Well, since the commander seems to have caught on, I'll say it outright.
1000606104.korean: 뭐, 사령관이 눈치챈 것 같으니 대놓고 말할게.

1000606105.english: want to set up the campsite where I picked up the spot. However, as the commander said, it is a very dangerous location.
1000606105.korean: 야영지 위치는 내가 잡은 곳에 하고 싶어.&n하지만, 사령관 말대로 너무 위험한 위치긴 하지.

1000606106.english: Then... couldn't we just eliminate the risk beforehand?
1000606106.korean: 그럼... 위험을 사전에 없애버리면 되지 않아?

1000606107.english: - May made an even more dangerous proposal with a nonchalant expression.
1000606107.korean: - 메이는 태연한 표정으로, 더 위험한 제안을 해왔다.

1000606108.english: Of course. Those Iron bugs won't even be able to properly replenish their troops anyway.
1000606108.korean: 당연하지. 어차피 저 철충들은 병력 보충도 제대로 안 될 거야.

1000606109.english: If we attack right now while morale is high, we can enjoy a comfortable camp. How about it, Commander?
1000606109.korean: 지금 사기도 높은 상태에서 바로 공격을 하면&n편안한 야영을 즐길 수 있지. 어때? 사령관?

1000606110.english: - To be honest, I would prefer to avoid combat if possible. After all, the concept of this landing is exploration and a vacation.
1000606110.korean: - 사실 되도록이면 전투를 피하고 싶은 게 사실이다. &n이번 상륙의 컨셉은 탐험과 휴가니까.

1000606111.english: - However, May has a point. It feels unsettling to leave enemies unnecessarily uneasy.
1000606111.korean: - 하지만 메이의 말도 일리가 있다.&n괜히 불안하게 적을 남겨두는 것도 찝찝하다.

1000606112.english: What? You're doing great! That's exactly it, Commander.

1000606113.english: A commander must become such a decisive man to suit me... and earn the respect of his subordinates.
1000606113.korean: 사령관이 그렇게 결단력 있는 남자가 되어야 내게 어울...&n부하의 존경을 받을 수 있는 거야.

1000606114.english: And... hehe. If you take that spot, there will be another gift.
1000606114.korean: 그리고... 후후. 그 자리를 차지하면 또 다른 선물이 있을 거야.

1000606116.english: - May left, leaving behind words I couldn't understand. What is this? Another gift...
1000606116.korean: - 메이는 뜻을 알 수 없는 말을 남기고 떠나 버렸다.&n뭐지? 또 다른 선물이라니...

1000606117.english: - ... I need to pull myself together. Preparing for battle is the priority.
1000606117.korean: - ... 정신을 차려야지. 전투를 준비하는 게 우선이다.

1000606118.english: - Well... I guess we'll find out about the gift soon.
1000606118.korean: - 뭐... 선물에 대해선 곧 알 수 있게 되겠지.

1000606120.english: Well done, Commander. Your command this time was quite good. I take back what I said about the manual.
1000606120.korean: 잘했어 사령관. 이번 지휘는 꽤 괜찮았어. 교본 이야기로 면박 준 건 취소할게.

1000606121.english: Oh...? What, are you expecting me to show you some respect?
1000606121.korean: 호오...? 뭐야, 내가 존경심이라도 보이길 바라는 거야?

1000606122.english: Instead of worrying about that, I recommend you try finding some useful tactics.
1000606122.korean: 그런 걸 신경 쓸 시간에, 쓸모 있는 전술이라도 찾아보는 걸 추천할게.

1000606123.english: - Why did humanity add a module to that girl that allows her to look down on humans?
1000606123.korean: - 어째서 인류는 저 소녀에게 인간을 깔볼 수 있는 모듈을 추가한 걸까?

1000606124.english: Alright! Now that the venue is set, we just need to gather the people for the fireworks, right?
1000606124.korean: 자! 이제 장소가 마련됐으니, 불꽃놀이에 참석할 인원만 모으면 되겠네?

1000606125.english: - With those tiny lips, she clearly said 'fireworks'.

1000606126.english: Commander, aren't you excited too? It's your chance to see the fireworks I personally prepared. How about my gift?
1000606126.korean: 사령관도 기대되지? 이 몸이 손수 준비한 폭죽을 구경할 기회야.&n어때, 내 선물은?

1000606127.english: Hehe! Wouldn't gunpowder suit the summer sky better than nuclear fission?
1000606127.korean: 후훗! 여름 하늘에는 핵분열 보다, 화약이 어울리지 않겠어?

1000606128.english: - To summarize, moving the base camp and securing the combat zone were all preliminary steps for May's fireworks.
1000606128.korean: - 정리하면 베이스캠프를 옮긴 것도, 전투지역을 확보한 것도 &n전부 메이의 그 불꽃놀이를 위한 사전 작업이라는 뜻.

1000606129.english: Hehe. Commander. I had no choice if I wanted to give you a gift. All the combatants agreed, too. For the sake of a romantic fireworks display between me and the Commander.
1000606129.korean: 후후. 사령관. 사령관에게 선물을 주려면 어쩔 수가 없었다고.&n전투원들도 전부 동의했어. 나와 사령관의 로맨틱한 불꽃놀이를 위해서 말야.

1000606130.english: Hmm... Since the commander is so soft, the subordinate soldiers suffer, right? The Steel Line guys must have had a bit of a hard time this time.
1000606130.korean: 흐응... 사령관이 그렇게 무르니까, 부하 병사들이 고생하는 거잖아?&n이번에는 스틸라인 친구들이 조금 고생했겠네.

1000606131.english: Hehe. I don't think that will happen, though. Make sure to take care of Marie's complaints in advance. Make sure to bring sunglasses when you go watching. As for my fireworks... No. There's no need to mention that beforehand.
1000606131.korean: 후훗. 그럴 일은 없다고 생각하지만. 마리의 항의는 미리 처리해 두라구.&n구경할 땐 선글라스 꼭 챙기길 바래. 내 폭죽은... 아냐. 미리 말할 필욘 없지.

1000606132.english: - May said with a grin, showing not the slightest bit of guilt.
1000606132.korean: - 메이는 조금도 죄책감 없는 표정으로 생글거리며 말했다.

1000606133.english: Commander? Do you think you know why I've been bothering you like this?
1000606133.korean: 사령관? 내가 왜 이렇게 귀찮게 굴었는지, 이유를 알 것 같아?

1000606134.english: - May approached me while I was contemplating what to say.
1000606134.korean: - 뭐라 대답할지 고민하고 있는 내게 메이가 다가왔다.

1000606135.english: - May is staring at me... but the atmosphere feels a bit strange...
1000606135.korean: - 나를 물끄러미 쳐다보는 메이... 하지만 분위기가 뭔가 이상하다...

1000606136.english: You idiot. Do you think we don't know what the commander was thinking?
1000606136.korean: 이 멍청이. 우리가 사령관이 생각한 걸 모르는 것 같아?

1000606137.english: Treasure hunting is good. I know the Commander isn't a fool to fall for such pipe dreams.
1000606137.korean: 트레저 헌팅 좋지. 나도 사령관이 그렇게 뜬구름 잡는 소리에 &n혹하는 멍청이가 아니란 것쯤은 안다고.

1000606138.english: Marie, Leona, and Khan probably noticed too.
1000606138.korean: 아마 마리랑 레오나, 칸도 눈치채고 있을걸?

1000606140.english: - For some reason, May, who usually acts so arrogant, seems a little cute. A slightly sulky expression really suits May...
1000606140.korean: - 어쩐지 평소엔 건방지게만 굴던 메이가 조금 귀엽게 보이는 것 같다.&n메이는 역시 살짝 삐친 표정이 잘 어울리지...

1000606141.english: What are you thinking? First, you need to know this. Just as the Commander gives us a rest, we want the Commander to get some rest too.
1000606141.korean: 뭘 생각하는 거야? 일단은 그걸 알아야 해.&n사령관이 우리에게 휴식을 주는 것처럼 우리도 사령관이 좀 쉬었으면 해.

1000606142.english: Because I know very well that the Commander works hard day and night.
1000606142.korean: 사령관이 낮에도... 밤에도 열심히라는 건 잘 알고 있으니까.

1000606143.english: Ha! What are you talking about? Are you being overconfident?

1000606144.english: Of course, the fireworks were prepared for me.
1000606144.korean: 당연히 불꽃놀이는 날 위해 준비한 거야.

1000606145.english: A dazzling, flickering flame—doesn't that suit Captain May best?
1000606145.korean: 화려하게 명멸하는 불꽃, 바로 이 메이 대장에게 가장 잘 어울리는 것 아니겠어?

1000606146.english: Well... if the commander wants it, I might let him watch from that corner.
1000606146.korean: 뭐... 사령관이 원한다면 저 구석에서 구경하는 것 정도는 봐주겠지만.

1000606147.english: … Well then... shall we get started?

1000606148.english: - May pressed the fire button without hesitation. Then...
1000606148.korean: - 메이는 망설임 없이 발사 버튼을 눌렀다. &n그러자...

1000606149.english: - Was it because of the lights adorning the sky...? May's cheeks turned red.
1000606149.korean: - 하늘을 수놓는 불빛 때문일까... 메이의 볼이 붉게 물들었다.

1000606150.english: ... I made eye contact with May, who was admiring the fireworks, but... I have a feeling that is hard to explain...
1000606150.korean: ... 불꽃을 감상하고 있던 메이와 눈이 마주쳤지만...&n뭐라 설명하기 힘든 기분이 든다...

1000606151.english: ... I'll tell you in advance, all of this was done entirely for myself. I just wanted to have fireworks... That's why I needed a spacious place.
1000606151.korean: ... 미리 말하지만 이 모든 건, 전부 나를 위해서 한 일이야.&n내가 불꽃놀이를 하고 싶었을 뿐이라구... 그래서 넓은 장소가 필요했지.

1000606152.english: I mean this safe… and quiet campsite…

1000606153.english: So stop getting your hopes up and go over to that corner to take a look.
1000606153.korean: 그러니까 쓸데없는 착각은 하지 말고 저 구석으로 가서 구경이나 하라고.

1000606154.english: ... Who told you to say thank you?... You stupid commander...

1000606155.english: - May slowly closed her eyes... Is she angry because I didn't move to the corner?
1000606155.korean: - 메이는 천천히 눈을 감았다...&n... 내가 구석으로 비키지 않아서 화가 난 걸까?

1000606156.english: - … Where on earth did May get all that gunpowder?
1000606156.korean: - … 메이는 저 많은 화약을 대체 어디서 구한 걸까?

1000606157.english: ... D-Commander? ...What... are you thinking right now? ... You're not... thinking of me, are you?
1000606157.korean: ... 사, 사령관? ...지금... 무슨 생각 하고 있어?&n… 설마… 날 떠올리고 있는건 아니겠… 지?

1000606158.english: ... Really...? Can you tell me what you're thinking... too?
1000606158.korean: ... 그래… ?&n무슨 생각 하는지… 나한테도 들려줄 수 있어?

1000606160.english: - Our night on the beach grew deeper little by little.
1000606160.korean: - 해변에서 맞이한 우리들의 밤이 조금씩 깊어져 갔다.

1000606162.english: Don't worry! I, Neri, will take care of it!
1000606162.korean: 걱정 마! 이 네리가 해결해 줄 테니!

1000606164.english: Th-thank you, Neri. Really... I hate summer... Why on earth hasn't humanity gone extinct yet those bugs?
1000606164.korean: 고, 고마워 네리. 정말... 여름은 싫어... &n도대체 인류는 멸망했는데 저 벌레들은 어째서 멸망하지 않는 거야?

1000606165.english: Well, since Iron bugs don't hate bugs? More importantly, Neri, I'm curious, isn't that heavy? Even carrying it around like that?
1000606165.korean: 뭐, 철충이 벌레들을 안 싫어하니까?&n그것보다 네리, 궁금한데, 그거 무겁지 않아? 그렇게 들고 다녀도?

1000606166.english: Not at all. Neri was designed to generate sufficient muscle strength. She also works out hard on a daily basis to maintain both her strength and cuteness.
1000606166.korean: 전혀. 네리는 충분한 근력을 낼 수 있도록 설계됐으니까.&n평소에도 근력과 귀여움을 유지하기 위해 운동도 열심히 하거든.

1000606167.english: Neri is really amazing. But exercising is hard, isn't it? Are you okay?
1000606167.korean: 네리는 정말 대단해.&n하지만, 운동하는 거 힘들잖아. 괜찮아?

1000606168.english: Well, Neri is a soldier, after all.

1000606170.english: Isn't being a soldier really tough?

1000606171.english: Well? I've never thought about that. Would it have been difficult before the apocalypse? There would have been far more wars than there are now...
1000606171.korean: 글쎄? 그런 건 생각해 본 적 없어.&n멸망 전이면 힘들었을라나? 지금보다 전쟁이 훨씬 더 많았을 테니...

1000606172.english: Well, what's the point of thinking about that?

1000606173.english: Aren't you curious, Neri? Why were you born a soldier?
1000606173.korean: 네리는 안 궁금해? 왜 군인으로 태어났는지?

1000606174.english: War is dangerous, and there are plenty of fun things in the world, even in a ruined world.
1000606174.korean: 전쟁은 위험하고, 세상엔 재밌는 게 많잖아.&n멸망한 세상이라도 말이야.

1000606175.english: Hmm... Triaina's words are a bit difficult.

1000606177.english: I think it would be good to think about it at least once.
1000606177.korean: 한 번 정도 생각해 보는 것도 좋을 것 같아.

1000606178.english: The funny thing is performing at a beach air show and getting cheered by the fans. I heard there used to be something like that back in the day...
1000606178.korean: 재밌는 건 해변 에어쇼에 출전해서 팬들의 환호성을 받는 거야.&n옛날엔 그런 것도 있었다던데...

1000606179.english: Actually, that is better than fighting. Although flight training might be a bit tough...
1000606179.korean: 사실 싸우는 것보단 그게 더 좋긴 하지.&n비행 훈련이 좀 힘들긴 하겠지만...

1000606180.english: By the way, since when have you been looking for treasure?
1000606180.korean: 그런데 넌 언제부터 보물을 찾아다닌 거야?

1000606181.english: Treasure hunt? Ah! I used to be in the PECS Salvage Division. I was unlucky so I hardly ever saw humans... but back then, there were no humans in the Salvage Division.
1000606181.korean: 보물 찾기? 아! 난 원래 펙스 인양 사업부에 있었어.&n운이 없어서 인간들은 거의 본 적이 없지만... 그땐 인양 사업부엔 인간이 없었으니까.

1000606182.english: When the Iron bug came, they suddenly told me to find a suitable location to build a habitat underwater.
1000606182.korean: 철충이 왔을 때, 갑자기 바닷속에 주거지를 만든다고&n적절한 위치를 찾으라고 하더라고.

1000606183.english: Huh? Then what did you do after the war? I mean when the bioroids got together to form a resistance.
1000606183.korean: 응? 그럼 전쟁 이후엔 뭘 한 거야? &n바이오 로이드들끼리 모여서 저항군을 만들 때 말야.

1000606184.english: It doesn't suit me. I wanted a leisurely adventure, not a war.
1000606184.korean: 나랑 안 맞아. 난 전쟁이 아니라, 여유롭게 모험을 하고 싶었거든.

1000606185.english: That's because Triaina doesn't really know. Living as a soldier is an adventure, too. Fighting coolly and smashing Iron Bugs...
1000606185.korean: 그건, 트리아이나가 잘 몰라서 그래. 군인으로 사는 것도 모험이야. &n멋지게 싸우고 철충도 때려 부수고...

1000606186.english: ... I lost in the end... but still, fighting the Iron bug was fun. Ah! There really was something fun about it.
1000606186.korean: ... 결국은 졌지만...&n그래도 철충과 싸울 때는 신났어. 아! 재미있는 게 있긴 있었구나.

1000606187.english: Neri has the temperament of a soldier! It seems like a perfect fit.
1000606187.korean: 네리는 군인 체질이구나! 딱 맞는 것 같아.

1000606188.english: Combat and exploration are all good, but right now I want to get my nails done. It looks like my nails are all cracked from the sea breeze.
1000606188.korean: 전투고 탐험이고 다 좋은데 난 지금은 네일을 좀 하고 싶어.&n바닷바람에 손톱이 다 갈라진 것 같아.

1000606189.english: I don't know why Undine likes things like that. It's not like doing nails makes bullets or missiles fly harder...
1000606189.korean: 운디네는 왜 그런 걸 좋아하는지 모르겠어.&n네일을 한다고 총알이나 미사일이 더 세게 나가는 것도 아닐 텐데...

1000606190.english: What are you talking about? It’s a sin not to dress up when you were born as pretty as me. Neri was also born cute for once... so what do you think? Shall I teach you a thing or two?
1000606190.korean: 무슨 소리야. 나처럼 예쁘게 태어나서 안 꾸미는 건 죄를 짓는 거라고.&n네리도 모처럼 귀엽게 태어난 편인데... 어때? 내가 좀 가르쳐 줄까?

1000606191.english: Ugh! Last time too, after saying that and making me unable to move, you spent a whole two hours drawing on Neri's face. Neri is cute enough as she is.
1000606191.korean: 윽! 저번에도 그렇게 말하고 꼼짝 못 하게 만들고 나선&n네리 얼굴에 2시간이나 그림을 그렸잖아. 네리는 지금도 충분히 귀여워.

1000606194.english: Oh, did you call me? What is it? What is it?

1000606195.english: We are walking without knowing our destination. Could you share your current situation?
1000606195.korean: 우린 목적지도 모른 채 걷고 있어요. &n현재 상황을 공유해 주실래요?

1000606196.english: Hmm... I just have to go a little further. My gut feeling tells me that if I go just a little further, I'm sure I'll find what I'm looking for.
1000606196.korean: 음... 좀 더 가면 돼.&n내 감에 따르면 조금만 더 가면 분명히 내가 찾는 게 나올 거야.

1000606197.english: If you rush me, I might make a mistake, so trust your gut. I promise you, at least you won't go back empty-handed.
1000606197.korean: 보채면 실수할 수도 있으니까 내 감을 믿어. &n약속하는데, 적어도 빈손으로 돌아가진 않을걸?

1000606198.english: To be honest, this is my first time in a situation like this, so I'm not sure if I'm doing a good job... Sigh... The Commander gave the order, so I have no choice but to follow it.
1000606198.korean: 사실, 이런 상황은 처음이라 지금 잘 하고 있는지 모르겠네요&n휴... 사령관님이 명령하셨으니 따를 수밖에요.

1000606201.english: Being a commander. Sirene thinks a lot even in her daily life.
1000606201.korean: 지휘관이라는거. 세이렌은 평소에도 생각을 엄청 많이 하더라구.

1000606202.english: In the past, I only did what I was told, but now that I wander around as I please... I'm not really sure.
1000606202.korean: 난 옛날엔 시키는 일만 했고 지금은 마음대로 떠돌아다니다 보니...&n잘 모르겠어.

1000606203.english: ... You say it's difficult? I've never thought about that.
1000606203.korean: ... 어렵다니, 그런 건 생각해 본 적 없어요.

1000606204.english: For me, surviving was more important.

1000606205.english: I think I'm doing my best because I don't want to lose my sisters... Yes... I think so...
1000606205.korean: 저는 자매들을 잃기... 싫어서 최선을 다하는 것 같아요.&n네... 그런 것 같아요...

1000606207.english: Before I met you, Commander... I once lost my commander and all my comrades. Everyone died except me.
1000606207.korean: 사령관님을 만나기 전에... 지휘관과 동료들을 모두 잃은 적이 있어요.&n저를 빼고 모두 죽었죠.

1000606208.english: I thought she was a perfect soldier, but due to a single mistake... all her comrades died. I... don't want to end up like that.
1000606208.korean: 완벽한 군인이라 생각했던 분인데, &n한순간의 실수로... 동료들까지 다 죽었어요. 전... 그렇게 되고 싶진 않아요.

1000606209.english: Because dying is scary... especially my sisters dying...
1000606209.korean: 죽어 버리는 건 무서우니까... 특히 자매들이 죽는 건...

1000606211.english: Is Sirene working hard to save her sisters? It seems like it would be really hard to live worrying every day.
1000606211.korean: 세이렌은 자매들을 살리기 위해서 열심히 일하는 거야? &n매일 걱정하면서 사는 건 엄청 힘들 것 같아.

1000606212.english: Not really. It varies by model. I guess that's how it was designed.
1000606212.korean: 별로요. 모델마다 다르니까. 전 그렇게 설계됐나보죠.

1000606213.english: ... That's timely help. To think it's an Iron bug at just the right time...

1000606215.english: For now, I will prepare for battle. There aren't many Iron Bugs here, so it isn't very dangerous, but... I can't let my guard down.
1000606215.korean: 일단은 전투 준비를 할게요. &n여기 철충들은 숫자가 많지 않아 크게 위험하진 않지만... 방심할 순 없으니.

1000606216.english: Oh! It's sparkling! Isn't this all gold?
1000606216.korean: 오! 반짝거린다! 이거 다 금 아냐?

1000606217.english: Ex-seollung! It's a gold coin! I never thought something like this would be near an Iron Bug...
1000606217.korean: 엑설렁! &n금화에요! 철충 근처에 이런 게 있을 줄은...

1000606218.english: See? I'm telling you, I was right! I knew it would be nearby!
1000606218.korean: 봤지? 내 말이 맞다니까?&n이 근처일 줄 알았어!

1000606219.english: Just follow me. I'm really good at finding treasure. I'm a total veteran in this field!
1000606219.korean: 나만 따라오면 돼. 나 보물 찾는 건 진짜 잘하거든.&n이쪽 방면에선 완전 베테랑이라는 말씀!

1000606220.english: Honestly, we didn't believe it, right? We just thought they were ordinary wandering bioroids...
1000606220.korean: 우리는 솔직히 안 믿었어 그치?&n그저, 평범한 떠돌이 바이오로이드인 줄로만 알았는데...

1000606221.english: No! I completely trusted Neri from the moment I first saw her! Somehow, I got a tingling sensation in my heart.
1000606221.korean: 아니! 네리는 처음 봤을 때부터 완전 믿었는데?&n어쩐지 내 가슴에 찡!하는 감각이 왔다구.

1000606222.english: Ah, yes... I am a bad girl.

1000606223.english: Hehe~! It’s understandable that everyone feels that way until they actually pick this up. I get it.
1000606223.korean: 헤헤~! 이걸 주워보기 전까지는, 다들 그럴 수 있지. 나는 이해해.

1000606224.english: B-but... isn't there anything a bit prettier? It's not my style. For example... like jewelry shapes... specifically, necklaces or rings...
1000606224.korean: 그, 그런데... 좀 더 예쁜 건 없을까? 내 취향 아니야.&n예를 들어... 장신구 모양이라거나... 구체적으로 목걸이나 반지...

1000606225.english: Phew... They are all things that are too big and heavy for a frail girl like me to carry around.
1000606225.korean: 휴... &n나같이 가녀린 소녀가 갖고 다니기엔 너무 크고 무거운 것들뿐이야.

1000606226.english: More importantly, Triaina? Where are we going next? Treasure hunting is actually super fun, much more than I thought! Let's hurry up and go!
1000606226.korean: 그보다 트리아이나? 다음은 어디로 가는 거야? &n생각보다 보물 찾기란 거 엄청 재밌는데? 얼른 가자고!

1000606227.english: I'd like to do that, too, but... first, shouldn't we ask the Sirene?
1000606227.korean: 나도 그러고 싶지만. &n우선, 세이렌에게 물어봐야 되지 않을까?

1000606228.english: Hmm... it looks like the Sirene is communicating?
1000606228.korean: 음... 세이렌은 통신 중인 것 같은데?

1000606229.english: Our commander does a good job, right? Her personality is... decent, too... Even though Sirene looks stiff, once you actually get close to her, she treats you incredibly kindly.
1000606229.korean: 우리 지휘관 일 잘하지? 성격도 뭐... 괜찮고... 세이렌이 딱딱해 보여도,&n막상 친해지고 나면, 엄청 친절하게 대해 준단 말이지.

1000606230.english: And, Sirene is probably the busiest in Orca, right? Sirene isn't satisfied until she finishes her work perfectly, you know?
1000606230.korean: 그리고, 세이렌이 아마 오르카에서 제일 바쁠걸?&n세이렌은 일을 완벽하게 끝내야지 직성이 풀린다니까?

1000606231.english: Come to think of it... she doesn't even wear makeup... and of course, she doesn't get her nails done.
1000606231.korean: 하긴... 화장도 안 하더라... 네일도 당연히 안 하고.

1000606232.english: Hehehe! That's because Undine kept bothering me. Do you remember how she made a mess of my face?
1000606232.korean: 헤헤헤! 그건 운디네가 귀찮게 달려드니까 그렇지.&n내 얼굴 엉망으로 만들었던 거 기억나?

1000606233.english: That's because Neri's skin tone isn't very good. Neri is a deckhand, after all. Neri should take better care of her skin.
1000606233.korean: 그건 네리 피부 톤이 별로라서 그런 거라구.&n네리는 갑판병이니까. 네리는 스스로의 피부를 좀 소중히 여기는 게 좋아.

1000606234.english: Isn't that right? ... Huh? Ms. Triaina? Where did she go?

1000606235.english: Yes, Commander. We have secured the area. We will proceed. I will convey that to Triaina as well. Yes. Don't worry.
1000606235.korean: 네, 사령관님. 구역 확보했어요. 계속 진행할게요.&n트리아이나 씨에게도 그렇게 전할게요. 네. 걱정 마세요.

1000606236.english: Ms. Triaina? Oh, you're here? You heard the communication, right? Please continue with the updates.
1000606236.korean: 트리아이나씨?&n아 계셨네요? 통신은 들으셨죠? 계속 안내 부탁해요.

1000606237.english: Ms. Triaina? Do you have something to say?

1000606239.english: Even I've never seen an employee go this far. Hehe.
1000606239.korean: 나도, 이렇게까지 하는 직원은 본 적 없는데. 헤헤.

1000606240.english: Because it's my job. I don't want to be a failure.
1000606240.korean: 제 일이니까요. 실패자가 되고 싶진 않아요.

1000606241.english: ... Do you have anything else to say?

1000606243.english: If it's because you're afraid of losing your sisters...
1000606243.korean: 혹시 자매들을 잃는 게 무서워서 그런 거라면...

1000606244.english: Let's stop talking about that. Please.

1000606245.english: I know Triaina is curious, but going that far... isn't that a bit much?
1000606245.korean: 트리아이나씨가 호기심 많은 건 알고 있지만, &n거기까지 들어가는 건... 아니지 않나요?

1000606246.english: For us, no. This team has more important work to do, so... let's focus on the mission.
1000606246.korean: 우리한텐, 아니. 이 팀은 더 중요한 일을 맡고 있으니...&n임무에 집중하도록 해요.

1000606247.english: Yeah... but Sirene... it wasn't that I felt afraid of losing my sisters. That's scary too, but because of that, the Commander...
1000606247.korean: 응... 하지만 세이렌... 자매들을 잃는 게 무섭다는 느낌은 아니었는걸.&n그것도 무섭지만 그거 때문에 사령관이...

1000606248.english: Stop right there. I won't tolerate any more.
1000606248.korean: 거기까지 하세요. 더 이상은... 용납하지 않아요.

1000606249.english: Okay, okay. But have you ever thought about what the Captain really wants from the Sirene?
1000606249.korean: 알았어. 알았어.&n하지만, 캡틴이 세이렌에게 정말 바라는 게 뭔지 생각해 본 적 있어?

1000606250.english: The Captain was more curious about how Sirene and Horizon's friends were doing than about the treasure, wasn't he?
1000606250.korean: 캡틴은 보물보다, 세이렌과 호라이즌 친구들이&n어떻게 지내는지를 더 궁금해하던걸?

1000606251.english: I'm serious. Believe me! Make sure you do that in your next report. Got it? Got it... I'll stop now, so please don't glare at me too much.
1000606251.korean: 정말이야. 내 말을 믿으라구! 다음 보고는 꼭 그걸 해봐. 알았지?&n알았어... 그만할 테니 너무 노려보진 말아줘.

1000606252.english: Hey guys~? Can you take me along too?

1000606253.english: … No, Ms. Triaina is wrong about that.

1000606254.english: … There’s no way anything is more important than the mission.
1000606254.korean: … 임무보다 중요한 게... 있을 리 없어요.

1000606255.english: - The sun rose over the beach, and the frenzied fireworks finally came to an end.
1000606255.korean: - 해변에 해가 떠오르고, 광란의 불꽃놀이가 마침내 끝이 났다.

1000606256.english: - The smell of gunpowder and smoke still filled the air all around.
1000606256.korean: - 아직도 사방에는 화약 냄새와 연기가 가득했다.

1000606258.english: - What's surprising is that the Steel Line squad members who enjoyed the fireworks together show affection for May.
1000606258.korean: - 놀라운 건, 불꽃놀이를 같이 즐긴 스틸라인 분대원들이 메이에게 호감을 &n보인다는 점.

1000606259.english: It was absolutely amazing! I'm looking forward to tonight too!
1000606259.korean: 정말 끝내줬지 말입니다! 오늘 밤도 기대되지 말임다!

1000606260.english: What did I see all night? To think a missile would be used in that way.
1000606260.korean: 제가 밤새 뭘 본 거죠? 미사일을 그런 방식으로 쓰다니요.

1000606261.english: Hehe~! It’s an event I prepared, so of course you’re bound to like it.
1000606261.korean: 후훗~! 내가 준비한 이벤트인데, 당연히 마음에 들 수밖에 없겠지.

1000606262.english: Anyway, the Steel Line soldiers are starting to look pitiful now.
1000606262.korean: 그나저나, 이젠 스틸라인 병사들이 불쌍할 지경이야.

1000606263.english: There is no way such a sophisticated event would come from the head of the straitlaced Captain Marie. Steel Line should be grateful to me.
1000606263.korean: 고지식한 마리 대장 머리에선, 이런 고상한 이벤트가 나올 리 없지.&n스틸라인은 내게 고마워 해야 해.

1000606264.english: - Thanks to May setting off firecrackers for four hours straight, there is nothing left of gunpowder in Orca.
1000606264.korean: - 4시간 내내 메이가 폭죽을 터트려댄 덕분에 오르카에는 화약 비슷한 것도&n남아있지 않다.

1000606265.english: - Well, it doesn't really matter since they used reserve gunpowder that isn't used in modern weapons anyway, and fireworks are a pretty good event for a summer...
1000606265.korean: - 뭐, 어차피 요즘 무기에 사용되지 않는 예비 화약을 쓴 거라 상관은 없고&n여름 이벤트로 불꽃놀이는 꽤나 괜찮은 이벤트니까...

1000606266.english: It's Doom Bringer fireworks! So, what's going to happen tonight? We're going to make it wild tonight, too, you know?
1000606266.korean: 둠 브링어제 폭죽이지 말입니다! 그래서, 오늘 밤은 어떻게 되는 겁니까? &n오늘 밤도 화끈하게 가는 거지 말입니다?

1000606267.english: Hmm? I suppose we’d have to ask our great Commander about that.
1000606267.korean: 흐음? 그건 우리 위대하신 사령관님 능력에 물어봐야겠지?

1000606268.english: - Look at that expression! May is planning to pass the buck to me again this time.
1000606268.korean: - 저 표정! 메이는 이번에도 내게 떠넘길 셈이다.

1000606269.english: - We've run out of gunpowder, but I don't want to be the commander who ruins the mood. Shall I naturally change the subject?
1000606269.korean: - 화약은 다 떨어진 상태지만 분위기를 망치는 사령관이 되고 싶지 않다. &n자연스럽게 화제를 돌려 볼까?

1000606271.english: Haa... You came all the way here just to torment your subordinates? I'm disappointed, Commander.
1000606271.korean: 하아... 여기까지 와서, 부하들 괴롭히라고? 실망이야 사령관.

1000606272.english: Don't my subordinates even have the luxury of enjoying the summer? Why don't you let them have their freedom on a day like today? I'm counting on you, Commander.
1000606272.korean: 내 부하들은 여름을 즐길 여유도 없어? &n오늘 같은 날은 프리하게 두는 게 어때? 부탁할게. 사령관님.

1000606273.english: - May is looking at me with eyes full of mischief.
1000606273.korean: - 메이는 장난기 가득한 눈으로 날 쳐다보고 있다.

1000606274.english: - Usually, troublesome things are bound to happen in times like this... I feel uneasy.
1000606274.korean: - 보통 이럴 땐 귀찮은 일이 벌어지게 마련인데... 불안하다.

1000606275.english: Hmm? Something to say? What could the Commander possibly have to say to me?
1000606275.korean: 흐응? 할 말~? 사령관이 내게 무슨 할 말이 있을까?

1000606276.english: Wow! Commander, you're the best! Then, Brownie will sortie!
1000606276.korean: 햐! 사령관님 최고! 그럼 브라우니 출격하겠습니다!

1000606277.english: Squad Leader? I’ve discovered an awesome cave! Follow me, Squad Leader!
1000606277.korean: 분대장님? 제가 끝내주는 동굴을 발견했지 말입니다. 분대장님 따라 오시지&n말입니다!

1000606278.english: A-a cave? What cave... What kind of trouble are you trying to cause now!
1000606278.korean: 도, 동굴? 동굴은 또 무슨...&n또 무슨 사고를 치려고!

1000606279.english: Your Excellency, Commander! I will be leaving now... I will be out for a moment.
1000606279.korean: 사령관 각하! 전 이만... 잠시 자리를 비우겠습니다.

1000606280.english: Hmph~ To think you're asking what I have to say... Commander, this is ridiculous. Shouldn't you be the one with something to say to me?
1000606280.korean: 흥~ 할 말을 묻다니... 사령관 어이가 없네?&n오히려 사령관이 내게 할 말이 있어야 하는 거 아냐?

1000606282.english: You really have no sense. Commander?

1000606283.english: - May let out a small sigh.

1000606284.english: I told the Commander to rest... Of course, it was 95% for my own sake, but anyway, I even prepared fireworks for you? You're not grateful?
1000606284.korean: 내가 사령관 쉬라고... 물론 나를 위해서인 게 95% 지만 &n어쨌든 불꽃놀이까지 준비해 줬는데? 고맙지 않다고?

1000606285.english: It's not just a simple 'Ah.' If you're grateful as a human being, shouldn't you show it properly instead of just saying it?
1000606285.korean: 아아'가 아냐. &n인간으로서 고마우면 말로 때울 게 아니라, 제대로 표시를 해야 하는 거 아냐?

1000606286.english: - It seems like May wants me to show that I'm grateful for something. What is it?
1000606286.korean: - 메이는 뭔가 내가 고마워한다는 표시를 하길 원하는 것 같다.&n뭐가 있지?

1000606287.english: - First off... I'm wondering how I should show my gratitude to May.
1000606287.korean: - 일단... 메이에게 뭘로 고마움을 표시해야 할까? 고민이 된다.

1000606289.english: Okay. I'll give you a hint. Now, listen carefully.
1000606289.korean: 좋아. 내가 힌트를 줄게. 자, 잘 들어봐.

1000606290.english: Beach, blazing sun, white sand. Now, what does that make you think?
1000606290.korean: 해변, 이글거리는 태양, 백사장.&n자, 이게 무슨 생각이 들어?

1000606291.english: - Ah. Even I, who tend to be oblivious, can figure it out right away. If it's just this much...
1000606291.korean: - 아아. 눈치가 없는 편인 나도 금방 알아들을 수 있다. &n이 정도라면야...

1000606293.english: Are you saying that I, of all people, went into the same water as kids like that and squealed with excitement? Is that what you want to see, Commander? Huh?
1000606293.korean: 이 몸이 저런 애들이랑 한 물에 들어가서 꺄꺄거리면서 놀란 말이야?&n사령관은 그걸 보고 싶은 거야? 응?

1000606294.english: - What on earth could it be? I have no idea.

1000606295.english: Fine. Well, I already knew the Commander was that kind of person. It can't be helped. I'll teach him a lesson.
1000606295.korean: 좋아. 뭐, 사령관이 그런 인간인 줄은 이미 알고 있었으니.&n어쩔 수 없지. 내가 제대로 가르쳐 줄게.

1000606296.english: I've been staying indoors every day lately, so I'm deficient in Vitamin D.
1000606296.korean: 난 요즘, 매일 실내에만 있어서 비타민 D가 부족해.

1000606297.english: If I explain it this much, even the dumbest person would understand what I'm saying, right?
1000606297.korean: 이 정도까지 말해주면 아무리 멍청해도 무슨 말인지 알겠지?

1000606298.english: Yeah. It's really hard to teach everything one by one. Really...
1000606298.korean: 그래. 정말 하나하나 가르치기 힘드네. 정말...

1000606299.english: No, I'm sick of it here. Let's move, Commander. I thought the southern beach looked nice. What do you think, Commander?
1000606299.korean: 아니, 여긴 질렸어. 자리를 옮기자 사령관.&n나는 남쪽 백사장이 괜찮아 보이던데. 사령관은 어떻게 생각해?

1000606300.english: - The southern beach is probably swarming with Iron bugs. ... This warmonger must be looking for another battle.
1000606300.korean: - 남쪽 백사장에는 아마 철충이 가득 있을 거다.&n... 분명히 이 전쟁광은 또 다른 전투를 원하는 것이겠지.

1000606301.english: I've already roughly scouted the location. There are a few Iron bugs, but that shouldn't be a big problem for the Commander.
1000606301.korean: 이미 위치는 대충 봐뒀어. &n철충 몇 마리가 있긴 하지만, 사령관에게 큰 문제는 아닐 거야.

1000606302.english: Got it? Make sure to prepare in advance.

1000606303.english: If you don't properly show your sincerity, I'll get really angry...
1000606303.korean: 성의를 제대로 표시해 두지 않으면 정말 화낼 테니까...

1000606305.english: Now, all we have to do is sunbathe!
1000606305.korean: 이제, 우린 일광욕만 하면 되는 거지 말입니다!

1000606306.english: Brownie? Could you tell me how to sunbathe?

1000606307.english: Huh? Didn't the squad leader know that?
1000606307.korean: 에엥? 그건 분대장님이 알고 계신 것 아니었슴까?

1000606308.english: Th-that kind of thing. As a combat soldier, how would I know? I've never done it before...
1000606308.korean: 그, 그런 거. 전투병인 제가 알 리 없잖아요.&n한 번도 해본 적 없는데...

1000606309.english: In times like this, I need a manual. Ah, no! What am I talking about? A manual? I mean... wouldn't there be a sunbathing manual?
1000606309.korean: 이럴 땐, 교범이 필요해요. 아, 아니! 내가 무슨 말을 하는 거야?&n매뉴얼? 그러니까... 일광욕 매뉴얼이 있지 않을까요?

1000606310.english: - The flustered soldiers of the Steel Line look a bit pitiful.
1000606310.korean: - 허둥대는 스틸라인의 병사들이 조금 안쓰럽게 보인다.

1000606311.english: Haa~. Do the Steel Line guys not even know how to enjoy a summer vacation? Well, I suppose it’s only natural since they were under Marie. She’s a fool who doesn’t know how to have fun either.
1000606311.korean: 하아~. 스틸라인 친구들은 여름휴가도 즐길 줄 모르는 거야?&n뭐, 마리 밑에 있었으니 당연하긴 하지. 걔도 놀 줄 모르는 바보니까.

1000606313.english: Hehe. Everyone, follow me. Even you incompetent fools must want to rest. I’ll teach you.
1000606313.korean: 후훗. 모두 날 따라와.&n무능한 너희들도 쉬고 싶은 마음은 있을 테니. 내가 가르쳐 주지.

1000606314.english: Oh! It seems Captain May knows exactly what she's talking about!
1000606314.korean: 오! 메이 대장님이 뭔가 제대로 알고 계신 것 같습니다!

1000606315.english: Squad leader, please follow me quickly.

1000606316.english: Where did I put the manual? Oh dear... I feel like I might have had it somewhere...
1000606316.korean: 매뉴얼을 어디 뒀더라? &n아이 참... 어딘가 있었던 것 같기도 하고...

1000606318.english: - Although she is a leprechaun skilled in training and combat, she often shows a weak side like this in other areas.
1000606318.korean: - 훈련과 전투에 능한 레프리콘이지만,&n그 외의 부분에선 이렇게 약한 모습을 보이곤 한다.

1000606319.english: - How many bioroids are like leprechauns...

1000606320.english: - No, now is not the time for such boring thoughts.
1000606320.korean: - 아니, 지금은 이런 재미없는 생각을 할 때가 아니지.

1000606321.english: - It looks like Fortune arrived safely, so we should enjoy our vacation.
1000606321.korean: - 포츈도 무사히 도착한 듯하고, 우린 휴가를 즐겨야겠지.

1000606322.english: Um... Commander? What are you doing here?
1000606322.korean: 저... 사령관님? 여기서 뭘 하고 계십니까?

1000606323.english: Please leave immediately. I have secured the perfect seat for you.
1000606323.korean: 얼른 가시지 말입니다. 제가 완벽한 자리를 구해놨지 말입니다.

1000606324.english: Also, I learned something about sunbathing: I learned that you shouldn't just lie there, but that you need to apply something to your body.
1000606324.korean: 그리고, 제가 일광욕에 대해 배운 게 있는데, 마냥 누워 있는 게 아니라&n몸에 뭔가를 발라야 한다고 배웠슴다.

1000606325.english: I will apply it thoroughly for you, so please rest assured and lie down, Commander.
1000606325.korean: 제가 꼼꼼하게 발라 드릴 테니 사령관님께선 안심하시고 누워 계시지 말입니다.

1000606326.english: Then, would you like to follow me? I will guide you.

1000606327.english: - Brownie snatched my hand the moment I finished speaking.
1000606327.korean: - 브라우니는 말이 끝나기가 무섭게 내 손을 잡아챘다.

1000606328.english: - Was it because of the hot weather? Brownie's hand felt slightly moist... Brownie's hand, gripping tightly so it wouldn't slip, was ridiculously small and soft.
1000606328.korean: - 더운 날씨 때문일까? 약간의 촉촉함이 느껴지는 브라우니의 손... &n미끄러지지 않게 꽉 잡은 브라우니의 손은 터무니없이 작고 보드라웠다.

1000606329.english: - ... While I was feeling the touch of the brownie, a great shadow approached silently.
1000606329.korean: - ... 브라우니의 감촉을 느끼고 있는 와중에, 위대한 그림자가 소리 없이 다가왔다.

1000606330.english: This... perverted commander... I wondered what you were up to... A summer beach, so your self-control melted away? To think you're acting like a pervert towards the soldiers!
1000606330.korean: 이... 변태 사령관... 뭘 하고 있나 했더니... &n여름 해변이라, 자제심이 녹아버린 거야? 병사들에게 변태 짓이나 하고 있다니!

1000606331.english: I don't want to hear excuses. Soldier? Applying oil is a really delicate task. Do you know that?
1000606331.korean: 변명은 듣기 싫어. 병사? 오일을 바르는 것은 정말 세심한 작업이야.&n알고 있어?

1000606332.english: Oh! Is that so?! I thought I could just apply it roughly.
1000606332.korean: 앗! 그렇습니까?! 전 그냥 대충 바르면 되는 줄 알았습니다.

1000606333.english: The lower-ranking soldiers are at risk of making mistakes, so I'll take care of them. You soldiers, just play on your own as I taught you earlier.
1000606333.korean: 하급 병사들은 자칫 실수할 위험이 있으니, 내가 알아서 할게.&n병사는 아까 가르쳐 준 대로 알아서 놀도록 해.

1000606334.english: Wait!! I've familiarized myself with the manual, too. It wasn't easy, but it's a task I can definitely handle.
1000606334.korean: 잠깐!! 저도 매뉴얼을 숙지했어요.&n쉽진 않았지만 저도 충분히 할 수 있는 작업이에요.

1000606335.english: I'll help apply oil to the Commander's... body.
1000606335.korean: 사령관님의 모... 몸에 오... 오일을 발라 드리는 건, 저도 돕겠어요.

1000606336.english: No... I'll take responsibility for taking care of the Commander... Everyone, get away...! Just...!!
1000606336.korean: 아니... 사령관은 내가 책임지고 발라 줄 테니까... &n다들 저리...! 좀...!!

1000606337.english: Then, I will only apply it to your face, Commander. That is alright, isn't it?
1000606337.korean: 그럼, 전 사령관님의 얼굴만 발라 드리겠슴다. 그건 괜찮지 말입니다?

1000606338.english: Whoa! I’ve got permission. Commander, I’ll take full responsibility for your face!
1000606338.korean: 햐! 허락 떨어졌지 말입니다. 사령관님 얼굴은 제가 확실하게 책임지겠슴다!

1000606339.english: No! Who gave permission to lay a hand on the commander's face without permission?
1000606339.korean: 안돼! 누가 멋대로 사령관 얼굴에 손을 대라고 허락했지?

1000606340.english: ... We can't leave all the hard work to Captain May alone. Pen! Let's use a pen. As long as we clearly define the sections, there won't be any problems.
1000606340.korean: ... 힘든 일을 메이 대장님께만 맡길 수는 없죠.&n펜! 펜을 사용하죠. 구획을 확실히 하면 문제 없을거예요.

1000606341.english: - ... The thoroughly prepared soldier Leprechaun took a pen out of her pouch... and drew a line along my neckline.
1000606341.korean: - ... 준비성이 철저한 병사 레프리콘은. 파우치에서 펜을 꺼내...&n내 목둘레를 따라 선을 그었다.

1000606343.english: What the hell are you doing! You stupid idiot!

1000606344.english: ...Huh? Squad Leader? Even I think this is a bit... strange... Summer... Horror? Is it something like that?
1000606344.korean: ... 어? 분대장님? 이건 제가 봐도 좀... 이상하지 말입니다...&n... 여름... 호러? 뭐 그런검까?

1000606345.english: Uh, give up on the face... Commander, your legs... leave the legs to me! Excuse me, Commander!
1000606345.korean: 어, 얼굴은 포기하고... 사령관님의 다리... 다리는 제게 맡겨 주세요!&n실례하겠습니다! 사령관님!

1000606346.english: - The leprechaun squeezed her eyes shut, held a pen in one hand, and groped my thigh.
1000606346.korean: - 레프리콘은 눈을 질끈 감고 한 손에는 펜을 든 채, 내 허벅지를 더듬었다.

1000606347.english: - If I mark up to both thighs, that would be quite a sight in its own way... But... I wish someone would stop me soon...
1000606347.korean: - 양쪽 허벅지까지 표시해두면, 그것 나름대로 정말 볼만하겠군...&n그렇지만... 이제 슬슬 누군가가 말려주면 좋겠는데...

1000606349.english: Leprechaun, reduce the area you are in charge of immediately! You are currently in charge of too large an area!
1000606349.korean: 레프리콘은 당장 맡은 부위를 줄이도록!&n지금 너무 넓은 영역을 맡고 있어!

1000606350.english: So, are you saying I should reduce the area? Like... like this?!
1000606350.korean: 며, 면적을 줄이란 말씀이신가요? 이... 이렇게 말인가요?!

1000606351.english: Aaaah! Why is your hand going up?! Snap out of it!!
1000606351.korean: 꺄아악! 왜 손이 위로 올라가는 거야?! 정신 차려!!

1000606352.english: - This is enough. I don't want to see the scribbles on my body increasing.
1000606352.korean: - 이만하면 충분하다. 내 몸에 낙서가 늘어나는건 보고싶지 않다.

1000606354.english: Huh? You mean to apply it in order?

1000606355.english: Wow! As expected of the Commander! I knew there was a way like that.
1000606355.korean: 햐! 역시 사령관이십니다! 그런 방법이 있었지 말입니다.

1000606356.english: Th-that's right! I guess I just need to apply it one by one?
1000606356.korean: 그, 그래! 한 명씩 발라주면 되겠구나?

1000606357.english: Then I’ll demonstrate first, so everyone watch carefully and learn.
1000606357.korean: 그럼 내가 먼저 시범을 보일 테니까, 다들 잘 보고 배워둬.

1000606358.english: Huh? The Commander asked me to take good care of him. Of course, I'm the first one.
1000606358.korean: 엑? 사령관님께서 제게 잘 부탁한다 하셨습니다.&n당연히 제가 제일 먼저지 말입니다.

1000606359.english: I can't accept that! It's dangerous, so Brownie, please wait your turn.
1000606359.korean: 그건 납득할 수 없어요! 위험하니까, 브라우니는 다음 차례를 기다리세요.

1000606360.english: Oh come on... Commander, it's just applying oil to your body, nothing special.
1000606360.korean: 에이... 사령관님 몸에 기름 바르는 것뿐인데, 별일 없지 말입니다.

1000606361.english: - ... Now, it doesn't matter if it's oil or whatever. The story shows absolutely no sign of ending.
1000606361.korean: - ... 이젠, 기름이든 뭐든 상관없다. 이야기가 도무지 끝날 기미가 보이질 않는다.

1000606362.english: - The sudden argument raced toward disaster, and after roughly applying oil to my body, I headed to where the sunbathing crowd was gathered.
1000606362.korean: - 갑작스럽게 벌어진 토론은 파국을 향해 달려갔고,&n난 몸에 대충 오일을 바른 뒤, 일광욕 인원들이 모여있는 곳으로 향했다.

1000606363.english: - By the way... I wonder if Sirene and Triaina are doing well?
1000606363.korean: - 그나저나... 세이렌과 트리아이나는 잘 지내고 있을까?

1000606364.english: - I was worried about them, but there are no threatening Iron Bugs nearby, so it shouldn't be a problem.
1000606364.korean: - 그녀들이 걱정되었지만, 이 근처엔 위협적인 철충은 없으니 문제없을 것이다.

1000606365.english: - I wish Sirene could get closer to her comrades...
1000606365.korean: - 세이렌이 동료들과 더 친해질 수 있다면 좋겠는데...

1000606366.english: Is this the place? I checked a few old-looking boxes. Is this the safe? I will report to the Commander.
1000606366.korean: 이곳인가요? 낡아 보이는 상자를 몇 개 확인했어요.&n여기가 금고인가요? 사령관님께 보고드릴게요.

1000606367.english: Ah, no! This isn't a vault. It just... looks like a shipwreck that washed ashore after being attacked by Iron bug while carrying treasure.
1000606367.korean: 아, 아냐! 여긴 금고가 아냐.&n그냥... 보물을 싣고 가다가 철충의 공격을 받아 난파된 게 흘러온 거 같은데?

1000606368.english: So... there has to be something like a large structure. You'll probably be able to recognize it at a glance.
1000606368.korean: 그러니까... 커다란 구조물 같은 게 있어야 해. &n아마 보면 한눈에 알아볼 수 있을 거야.

1000606369.english: I see. Do you happen to need more time?

1000606370.english: 3 minutes! No, just give me 1 minute.

1000606371.english: Let's take another look. I need a change of perspective... What if I've been holding the map upside down all this time?
1000606371.korean: 어디, 다시 한번 볼까? 발상의 전환이 필요해...&n내가 여태, 지도를 거꾸로 들고 있었다면?

1000606372.english: Hey! Don't just sit there, why don't you go play with Neri for a bit? I need to focus too.
1000606372.korean: 에이! 그러고 있지 말고, 네리랑 잠시 놀고 오는 게 어때? &n나도 집중해야 하니까.

1000606373.english: Thank you for your consideration. However, I can't do that right now because I am on a mission.
1000606373.korean: 배려는 감사해요. 하지만 지금은 임무 중이라 그럴 순 없어요.

1000606374.english: The Commander is waiting for the results.

1000606375.english: Hey, if you're that inept, it'll make things difficult for many people.
1000606375.korean: 에이, 그렇게 요령 없으면 여러 사람 피곤해져.

1000606376.english: Didn't I tell you? Our Captain wants Sirene to have a relaxing time.
1000606376.korean: 내가 말했지? 우리 캡틴은 세이렌이 맘 편하게 놀고 오길 바란다니까?

1000606377.english: Hmm, how long has Sirene been with the Captain?
1000606377.korean: 으음, 세이렌은 캡틴이랑 얼마나 오래 있었어?

1000606378.english: You mean by the number of days? Then... I'll have to do the calculations...
1000606378.korean: 이, 일수로 말인가요? 그러면... 계산을 해 봐야...

1000606379.english: Ahaha! Not that kind of thing. It's just been quite a while, right?
1000606379.korean: 아하하! 그런 거 말고. 그냥 꽤 오래됐지?

1000606381.english: So I'm asking, does the Captain look like someone who's interested in treasure?
1000606381.korean: 그래서 물어보는 건데, 혹시 캡틴이 보물에 관심 가지는 사람같이 보여?

1000606382.english: I don't understand the intention behind that question.

1000606383.english: You know, isn't the Commander actually a much nicer person than we think?
1000606383.korean: 있지, 사령관이라는 사람은 우리 생각보다 엄청 착한 사람이 아닐까?

1000606384.english: I've never seen anyone be this considerate of a bioroid before.
1000606384.korean: 난 바이오로이드를 이렇게까지 배려해 주는 사람은 처음 봤어.

1000606385.english: Do you remember when I first met you guys? Actually, I was a little nervous back then... Knowing that humans had sent me, I wondered if I was being dragged away to work.
1000606385.korean: 너흴 처음 만났을 때 기억나? 나 사실 그때 조금 긴장했어... &n인간이 보냈다는 걸 알고, 일하러 끌려가는 건 아닌가 싶었어.

1000606386.english: But our captain... treated me like a human being, you know? I really thought we had become business partners back then!
1000606386.korean: 그런데 우리 캡틴은... 날 마치 인간처럼 대해줬잖아?&n난 그때 정말 동업자가 된 줄 알았다니까?

1000606387.english: So, surely there must be a good reason why the Captain sent the Sirene all the way here, right?
1000606387.korean: 그런, 캡틴이 세이렌을 여기까지 보낸 건&n분명 그럴만한 이유가 있기 때문이 아닐까?

1000606388.english: Huh? What am I even saying? Sirene is playing with Neri because she's getting in the way of finding the way.
1000606388.korean: 응? 내가 무슨 말을 하고 있지?&n길 찾는데 방해되니까, 세이렌은 네리랑 놀고 있어.

1000606389.english: Neri? I think our explorer has lost her way.
1000606389.korean: 네리? 우리 탐험가님이 길을 잃은 것 같아.

1000606390.english: Hehe, Triaina just needs a little time.
1000606390.korean: 헤헷, 트리아이나는 그냥 시간이 조금 필요한 것뿐이야.

1000606391.english: Triaina is working so hard, but Undine is impatient again today.
1000606391.korean: 트리아이나는 저렇게 열심인데, 운디네는 오늘도 참을성이 없어.

1000606392.english: I don't want to hear that from you! Neri is just abnormally optimistic.
1000606392.korean: 너한테 그런 말 듣고 싶지 않거든?! 네리가 비정상적으로 낙천적 인거야.

1000606393.english: Phew. By now, they should be sunbathing on the beach. I'm jealous of the other team members.
1000606393.korean: 휴~. 지금쯤이면, 해변에서 선탠 하며 놀고 있어야 하는데. 다른 팀원들이 부럽다~.

1000606394.english: I find places like that stifling. This place is much more fun and better, you know?
1000606394.korean: 난 그런 곳은 갑갑해서. 여기가 훨씬 재밌고 좋은데?

1000606395.english: I'm so excited because I'm so curious about what's next.
1000606395.korean: 다음엔 뭐가 있을지 너무너무 궁금해서 신나.

1000606396.english: Does Undine really like just lying still on the beach?
1000606396.korean: 운디네는 정말 해변에 가만 누워 있는 게 좋은 거야?

1000606397.english: As I said, a frail girl like me doesn't belong in a sweaty adventure like this, you know? My skin looks pitiful under attack from the UV rays...
1000606397.korean: 말했지만, 나 같은 연약한 소녀는 이런 땀 냄새 나는 모험이랑 어울리지 않거든?&n자외선에 공격받는 내 피부가 불쌍해...

1000606398.english: Huh? You said you were going to get a tan anyway, even if you stayed at base camp?
1000606398.korean: 응? 베이스캠프에 남아 있어도, 어차피 선탠 할 거라면서?

1000606399.english: How tacky! That's completely different from this.
1000606399.korean: 촌스럽기는! 그거랑 이건 완전히 다른 거야.

1000606400.english: Hehe. Neri, I don't know why Undine is worrying about the same thing.
1000606400.korean: 헤헤. 네리는 왜 운디네가 같은 걸로 고민하는지 모르겠어.

1000606402.english: I will make sure to make sure you get a break next time.
1000606402.korean: 다음엔 휴식 시간을 꼭 챙겨 드릴게요.

1000606403.english: Huh? The First Captain is worried because Undine is grumbling?

1000606404.english: Ahaha... That's not your fault, Vice-Captain. The Commander ordered it. You don't need to apologize.
1000606404.korean: 아하하... 그건 부함장님 잘못이 아냐. 사령관이 시킨 거니까.&n부함장님이 사과할 필요는 없어요.

1000606407.english: Vice Commander, you have something to say, don't you?! What is it? What is it?
1000606407.korean: 부함장님 할 말 있구나?! 뭔데 뭔데?

1000606408.english: What? No. I have to go now.

1000606409.english: Right. Things aren't going well, are they? We have the right to know, too. We're finished now, aren't we? Lost and...
1000606409.korean: 맞아~. 뭔가 잘 안 풀리고 있죠? 우리도 알 권리가 있다구요.&n우리 이제 끝장이죠? 길도 잃고...

1000606410.english: Oh?! Something fun is about to come to mind!

1000606411.english: Undine is very worried, so Neri is worried.

1000606412.english: ... Ugh! That was kind of funny.

1000606414.english: You think it's funny?! Is it funny?! It's hot outside, really... Neri, you're doing this on purpose, aren't you?
1000606414.korean: 웃기다고?! 웃겨?! 날도 더운데, 정말...&n네리 너 일부러 그러는 거지?

1000606417.english: Ah, I laughed. I told you Neri is funny, didn't I? But, Undine is a bit lacking in sense of humor, isn't she?
1000606417.korean: 아, 웃었다. 역시 네리는 재밌다니까?&n근데, 운디네는 개그 센스가 조금 부족한걸?

1000606418.english: I... I... No. This place... This place is strange.

1000606419.english: Where do you keep trying to go? Is Undine doing this because she's uncomfortable with the First Officer?
1000606419.korean: 어딜 자꾸 가려는 거야? 운디네는 부함장님이 불편해서 그러는 거야?

1000606420.english: Is, is that so? I'm sorry. Undine...

1000606421.english: That can't be true! Why do you keep apologizing?
1000606421.korean: 그럴 리 없잖아요! 뭘 자꾸 사과하는 거예요?

1000606422.english: Undine got too angry, so Neri is worried. Apologize to the Vice-Captain.
1000606422.korean: 운디네가 화를 너무 많이 내서&n네리가 걱정이야. 부함장님께 사과해.

1000606424.english: That's strange. The coastline location doesn't match...

1000606425.english: Ack! You startled me. Is that the Captain?

1000606426.english: Phew... I thought you were whining again, hehe. Don't worry, Captain. Work is definitely in progress.
1000606426.korean: 휴... 난 또 보채는 줄 알았잖아,&n히히. 캡틴은 아무 걱정 마. 일은 확실하게 진행 중이니까.

1000606427.english: Huh? What do you mean, "how"? There's nothing wrong with it.

1000606428.english: Hehe... Everyone's having fun. That's what the Captain wants, right?
1000606428.korean: 헤헤... 다들 재밌게 놀고 있어. 그게 캡틴이 원하는 거지?

1000606429.english: Neri is always excited, and Undine is excited about dressing up. And Sirene... is playing a prank on Neri?
1000606429.korean: 네리는 늘 신났고, 운디네는 잔뜩 꾸밀 생각에 신나 있어.&n그리고 세이렌은... 네리에게 장난치고 있네?

1000606430.english: Yeah. The Captain needs to see that for himself... &nEek, it's an Iron Bug!
1000606430.korean: 응. 그건 캡틴이 직접 봐야...&n으엑, 철충이다!

1000606431.english: Captain? Hurry up and bring in backup. Hurry. It's urgent. It's urgent.
1000606431.korean: 캡틴? 얼른 지원 부탁해. 얼른. 급해. 급해.

1000606433.english: - The handling of the Iron bug is roughly finished.

1000606434.english: Captain~! You really pulled it off again this time? Thanks~!!
1000606434.korean: 캡틴~! 이번에도 한 건 했구나? 고마워~!!

1000606435.english: And, there's something I need to tell you. I think I've taken the wrong path. Sorry, Captain.
1000606435.korean: 그리고, 알려줄 게 있는데, 나 아무래도 길을 잘못 든 것 같아.&n미안해 캡틴.

1000606436.english: I'll find it properly this time, so don't worry too much.
1000606436.korean: 나, 이번엔 제대로 찾을 테니까. 너무 걱정하지 마.

1000606438.english: Haha. That's right, the Captain wasn't very interested in treasure.
1000606438.korean: 하하. 그랬지, 캡틴은 보물에는 별로 관심 없었지.

1000606440.english: I'm sorry. I don't have any results to report yet.

1000606441.english: I will do my best, Commander. Please give me a chance to make up for it.
1000606441.korean: 최선을 다할게요 사령관님. 제게 만회할 기회를 주세요.

1000606442.english: Yes, there are no special circumstances.

1000606443.english: What's wrong? Why are you two so awkward? Is this the first time you've met?
1000606443.korean: 뭐야. 왜 이렇게 서먹해? 둘이 처음 봐요?

1000606444.english: Okay, I understand. I plan to wait at my current location for a while until I find my way, and I'll contact you again, Captain.
1000606444.korean: 네~ 알겠어요~. 길을 찾을 때까지 현재 위치에서 잠시 대기할 예정이고,&n다시 연락할게요 캡틴.

1000606445.english: ... Well... yes... that's all. Because we weren't able to achieve proper results.
1000606445.korean: ... 그게... &n네... 이게 다예요. 저희가 제대로 성과를 올리지 못해서.

1000606447.english: Um... the Horizon soldiers are doing well. So... please don't worry too much, Commander.
1000606447.korean: 저... 호라이즌 병사들은 잘 지내고 있어요. 그러니... &n사령관님은 너무 걱정 마세요.

1000606448.english: I'm doing well too... You must have been very worried, right?
1000606448.korean: 저도... 잘 지내고 있고요... 걱정 많이 하셨죠?

1000606449.english: Oh? What is this? What kind of situation is this? Is this love? Is it okay for soldiers to act like this?
1000606449.korean: 오? 이게 뭐람? 이게 무슨 상황이람? 사랑인가? 군인들이 이래도 되는 거야?

1000606450.english: Ms. Triaina, shh! I have a lot of things I want to report to the Commander... no, I want to talk to the Commander about.
1000606450.korean: 트리아이나씨, 쉿!&n사령관님께 보고할... 아니, 사령관님이랑 이야기하고 싶은 게 잔뜩 생겼어요.

1000606451.english: Neri played a prank with a snake, but actually, I wasn't scared at all.
1000606451.korean: 네리 씨가 뱀으로 장난쳤는데, 사실 하나도 안 무서웠어요.

1000606452.english: And if you check Triaina's pockets, they will be full of gold coins. Still, please don't scold her too much.
1000606452.korean: 그리고 트리아이나 씨의 주머니를 확인해 보시면, 금화가 가득 나올 거예요.&n그래도 너무 책망하지 말아주세요.

1000606454.english: My face has gotten really dark. Please don't tease me. Also... there are so many mosquitoes. Could you please provide insecticide for the next sortie?
1000606454.korean: 저는 얼굴이 많이 새카매졌어요. 놀리시면 안 돼요. 그리고... 모기가 엄청 많아요. &n다음 출격 때는 살충제를 지급해 주시겠어요?

1000606455.english: And, the coconuts were really tasteless. I'll bring a few, would you like to try one? Also, that explosion was definitely Captain May's prank, wasn't it? I'm going to formally submit a petition.
1000606455.korean: 그리고, 코코넛은 정말 맛없었어요. 몇 개 가지고 갈 테니 한번 드셔 보시겠어요?&n또, 그 폭발음은 분명 메이 대장의 장난이겠죠? 정식으로 탄원서를 낼거예요.

1000606456.english: And... and... what should I do? There are so many things I want to tell you, Commander.
1000606456.korean: 그리고... 그리고...&n어떻게 하죠? 사령관님께 해주고 싶은 이야기가 너무 많아요.

1000606457.english: Uh... Captain? Can we go back and report on the progress? I need your advice.
1000606457.korean: 어... 캡틴? 우리 돌아가서 진척 상황을 보고해도 될까?&n캡틴의 조언이 필요해서 그래.

1000606458.english: We... no. I need the Commander. We can't even find our way properly on our own...
1000606458.korean: 저희는... 아니. 저는 사령관님이 필요해요.&n저희끼린 길도 제대로 찾아갈 수 없으니까...

1000606459.english: Yeah yeah~, sorry for being incompetent, but you know what? Sirene just wants to see the Captain, right?
1000606459.korean: 예 예~, 내가 무능해서 미안하네, 근데 말야&n세이렌은 그냥 캡틴이 보고 싶은 게 아니야?

1000606461.english: Ugh! So now that I'm being held accountable for the failure, all that's left is for me to suffer that sort of fate, right? The ending for a failed expedition leader is obvious, isn't it... Snip! Isn't it?
1000606461.korean: 크으! 난 이제 실패의 책임을 물어서 그렇고 그런 일을 당할 일만 남은 거네?&n실패한 탐험 대장의 결말이래봐야 뻔하지 뭐… 뎅겅! 아니겠어?

1000606462.english: Oh, dear... That is such a sad story... Stay strong, Triaina...
1000606462.korean: 저, 저런... 그건 정말 안타까운 이야기네요...&n힘내세요 트리아이나씨...

1000606463.english: Anyway, let's go back! I totally messed it up this time. I'll be able to do better next time.
1000606463.korean: 아무튼 돌아가자! 이번엔 시원하게 망쳤으니. 다음엔 더 잘할 수 있겠지.

1000606464.english: - Early in the morning, the expedition team, dressed in swimwear, returned safely.
1000606464.korean: - 이른 아침. 수영복 차림을 한 탐험대가 무사 복귀했다.

1000606465.english: - They rushed at me demanding a 'reward' for discovering the safe entrance... and I had to use several cans of oil...
1000606465.korean: - 그녀들은 금고 입구를 발견한 것에 대한 '상'을 요구하며 내게 달려들었고..&n나는 오일을 몇 통이나 써야만 했다…

1000606466.english: - By the time Horizon arrived, my whole body was covered in oil.
1000606466.korean: - 결국 호라이즌이 도착할 때쯤, 난 온몸이 오일로 범벅이 되어 버렸다.

1000606467.english: P-Commander? Are you alright? What on earth happened?
1000606467.korean: 사, 사령관님? 괜찮으세요? 대체 무슨 일이 있었죠?

1000606468.english: ... Hehe. Thank you for your hard work, Master.

1000606469.english: Perrault do was covered in oil. He mentioned gloves and asked me to apply oil, and once the task was finished, he took off his gloves and applied oil to me.
1000606469.korean: - 페로도 기름 범벅이 되어 있다. 장갑을 언급하며, 오일을 발라달라고 요구하더니.&n그 일이 끝나자 장갑을 벗고 내게 오일을 발라 주었다.

1000606470.english: - Perrault... maybe because she was a maid, she was very meticulous...

1000606471.english: Perrault? What on earth were you doing dressed like that... what did you do to the Commander?
1000606471.korean: 페로 씨? 그런 옷차림으로 대체 뭘... 사령관님을 어떻게 한 거죠?

1000606472.english: Hehe. It was worth a watch. Don't assume Miss Perrault is always a well-behaved cat.
1000606472.korean: 후후. 볼만했지요. 페로 양이 언제나 얌전한 고양일 거라 생각하지 마세요.

1000606473.english: Talking about escort duties, and even throwing off the gloves she hadn't taken off until the very end... Ah~. I wonder if that's a bit of a difficult story for a girl like Sirene?
1000606473.korean: 호위 운운하며, 끝까지 벗지 않던 장갑까지 벗어던지고...&n아~. 세이렌 씨 같은 소녀에게는, 조금 어려운 이야기이려나?

1000606474.english: Commander? I have the right to know, too!

1000606475.english: Ugh! Stop it, everyone!! Now isn't the time for such slick, sticky talk!
1000606475.korean: 에잇! 다들 그만!! 지금은 그런 미끌 끈적한 이야기를 할 때가 아냐!

1000606476.english: Captain! I heard you have good news? Tell me right away!
1000606476.korean: 캡틴! 좋은 소식이 있다면서? 얼른 말해줘~!

1000606477.english: - I conveyed information to Horizon about the 'suspicious facility' located on the coastal cliff.
1000606477.korean: - 나는 호라이즌에게, 해안 절벽에 위치한 '수상한 시설물'에 대한 정보를&n전달했다.

1000606478.english: Wow! I knew it! We could have found it if we were just one step further. What a shame! But still, this is exactly why treasure hunting is so fun.
1000606478.korean: 캬아! 역시 그랬구나! 우리도 한 발자국만 더 가면 찾을 수 있었는데 아깝다!&n그치만, 역시 트레저 헌팅은 이 맛에 하는 거지.

1000606479.english: That is... but. I'm worried about that... slippery story...
1000606479.korean: 그건... 그렇지만. 저는 그... 미끌미끌한 이야기가 신경 쓰여서...

1000606481.english: Yes... thanks to the Commander's support...

1000606482.english: - I stroked the Sirene's small head.
1000606482.korean: - 나는 세이렌의 자그마한 머리를 쓰다듬어 주었다.

1000606484.english: - A reliable girl who took responsibility for the Horizon crew without a single complaint. It was truly a stroke of luck to meet Sirene.
1000606484.korean: - 호라이즌의 대원들을 책임지면서도, 불평 한마디 없던 믿음직한 소녀.&n세이렌과 만난 건 정말 행운이다.

1000606485.english: Master? Any further physical contact is dangerous. Rather, let me tell you about the Iron bugs guarding the front of that facility...
1000606485.korean: 주인님? 그 이상의 신체 접촉은 위험합니다.&n그보다 그 시설 앞을 지키고 있는 철충들에 대한 이야기를...

1000606486.english: - The case is not over yet.

1000606487.english: - The front of that facility is guarded by Iron bug, and we must fight.
1000606487.korean: - 그 시설 앞은 철충들이 지키고 있고 우리는 전투를 벌여야 한다.

1000606488.english: - She briefly told me about the enemy. And also mentioned that a Sirene is needed.
1000606488.korean: - 적에 대한 이야기를 간략하게 해주었다. 그리고 세이렌이 필요하다는 이야기도.

1000606489.english: Sirene? You heard me, Captain? Let's set off again!
1000606489.korean: 세이렌? 캡틴 말 들었지? 다시 출발하자고!

1000606490.english: Uh... more importantly, I think we need to do something about that... slippery stuff on the Sirene's head.
1000606490.korean: 어... 그보다 세이렌 머리에 그... 미끈거리는 걸 어떻게 좀 해야 할 거 같은데?

1000606492.english: I will absolutely not disappoint the Commander this time. Follow me, Ms. Triaina.
1000606492.korean: 이번엔 절대 사령관님을 실망시키지 않겠어요. 저를 따라오세요 트리아이나씨.

1000606493.english: Oh? Why is the Sirene in such a good mood? Wait. Do I have to go along? This is really embarrassing!
1000606493.korean: 오? 세이렌은 왜 저리 기분이 좋대? &n잠깐. 내가 따라가야 되는 거야? 이거, 체면이 말이 아닌데?!

1000606494.english: Heh! If the Captain says so, I guess I have no choice. I'll just follow along this time. Then... uh... the girls in swimsuits? See you at the coastal cliffs.
1000606494.korean: 헷! 캡틴이 그렇게 말하면, 어쩔 수 없지. 이번엔 내가 따라가지 뭐.&n그러면... 그... 수영복 언니들? 해안 절벽에서 봐.

1000606495.english: Miss Triaina is always so full of confidence. Master? Would you give us an order as well? So that we don't arrive late.
1000606495.korean: 트리아이나 양은 늘 자신감이 넘치는군요.&n주인님? 저희에게도 명령을 내려 주시겠어요? 늦지 않도록 말이죠.

1000606496.english: Right... this is the right place... I've come to the right place...

1000606497.english: ... ...Look at this... I finally found you... Sirene...? Neri? Undine? ... You're all listening, right? I won't forget you...
1000606497.korean: ... ...이것 봐... 결국 찾았어... 세이렌...? 네리? 운디네? &n... 다들 듣고 있지? 너흴 잊지 않을게...

1000606498.english: Well, to be precise, our Bikini Pirates members 'accidentally' discovered this place. And, everyone on Horizon is safe.
1000606498.korean: 뭐, 정확히 하자면, 이곳은 우리 비키니 해적단 요원들이 '우연히' 발견했습니다.&n그리고, 호라이즌은 전원 무사하고요.

1000606499.english: Hey! Why are you acting like that all of a sudden? I was really setting the mood. You went too far, Pinky.
1000606499.korean: 에이! 갑자기 그러기야? 분위기 다 잡았는데. 너무했어 분홍 고양아.

1000606500.english: It seems you've forgotten that we fought at the forefront. Anyone who hears this would think we were just sitting around.
1000606500.korean: 저희가 선봉에서 싸운 건 잊은 것 같군요.? &n누가 들으면 저희는 앉아 있었던 걸로 생각하겠어요.

1000606501.english: So, what on earth is in this amazing place?
1000606501.korean: 그래서, 이 대단한 곳엔 대체 뭐가 있죠?

1000606502.english: - Triaina put on a serious expression and folded the 'map' she always carried in half.
1000606502.korean: - 트리아이나는 진지한 표정을 짓더니,&n늘 지니고 다니던 '지도'를 반으로 접었다.

1000606503.english: From here on, I really don't know anything.

1000606504.english: ... By any chance, do you guys know anything about a person named 'Angel'?
1000606504.korean: ... 혹시, 너희들은 '앙헬'이라는 사람에 대해 아는 게 있어?

1000606505.english: You mean Angel? If we're talking about common sense, I know that he was the leader of the Black River, and his year of death is unknown. I know that he murdered his own flesh and blood to become the leader...
1000606505.korean: 앙헬 말인가요? 상식 수준 정도라면요, 블랙리버의 수장이었고,&n사망연도 불명. 수장이 되기 위해 혈육들을 살해했다... 정도는 알고 있어요.

1000606506.english: But why are you asking that?

1000606507.english: So, you know what kind of company Black River was, right? We are about to enter the vault of Angel, the head of Black River.
1000606507.korean: 그럼, 블랙리버가 어떤 기업이었는지는 알고 있겠네?&n우린 지금 그 블랙리버의 총수, 앙헬의 금고로 들어갈려는 거야.

1000606509.english: I'm not sure what you're trying to say, but I can tell Miss Triaina is trembling.
1000606509.korean: 무슨 말을 하고 싶으신지는 모르겠지만,&n트리아이나양이 떨고 있는 건 알겠네요.

1000606510.english: It's Black River! I'm telling you, it's a military firm! How would you know what they've messed with the entrance?
1000606510.korean: 블랙리버라구! 군사업체라니까? 입구에 무슨 짓을 해 뒀을지 어떻게 알겠어?

1000606511.english: Hmph. So even Triaina has something she's afraid of. ...Could you please step aside for a moment?
1000606511.korean: 훗. 트리아이나씨도 무서워 하는 게 있군요.&n... 잠깐 비켜주시겠어요?

1000606512.english: Huh?! Wait! Don't go near me! Kitty!
1000606512.korean: 어?! 잠깐! 가까이 가지 마! 고양아!

1000606513.english: - Perrault knocked on the huge metal 'door' blocking the entrance to the cave.
1000606513.korean: - 페로는 동굴 입구를 막고 있는 거대한 금속제 '문'을 똑똑 두들겼다.

1000606514.english: Judging by Saman's sophisticated craftsmanship, this door is unnecessarily large and heavy. You can get a glimpse of Angel's taste.
1000606514.korean: 삼안의 정교한 기술력을 기준으로 평가하자면, 이 문은 쓸 데 없이 크고,&n무겁습니다. 앙헬이라는 사람의 취향을 엿볼 수 있네요.

1000606515.english: Thanks to this thickness... it looks like it's going to take me quite a while to cut through. It's a bit frustrating, isn't it?
1000606515.korean: 이 두께 덕분에... 제가 베어내는 데는, 시간이 제법 많이 걸릴 것 같네요.&n조금 분한걸요?

1000606516.english: Yes, Master. What do you intend to do?

1000606517.english: - Seeing the Sirene's armament, the admirable Sirene seemed to have already read my mind.
1000606517.korean: - 세이렌의 무장을 보니, 기특한 세이렌은 이미 내 생각을 읽은 듯했다.

1000606518.english: Yes, Commander. Did you call me?

1000606520.english: Everyone, please step back. No, please move out of the way.
1000606520.korean: 모두, 물러서 주세요. 아니, 자리를 피해 주세요.

1000606521.english: Haa... So that is what you intended to do after all, Master? I will escort you to a safe place.
1000606521.korean: 하아... 결국 그렇게 하실 생각이셨군요.&n주인님? 제가 안전한 곳으로 모시겠어요.

1000606522.english: Then, Miss Sirene, please wait for Master's signal. We'll be going now...
1000606522.korean: 그럼, 세이렌 양은 주인님의 신호를 기다려 주세요.&n우리는 이만...

1000606523.english: Wait! Take me with you too!!!

1000606524.english: Sirene, are you okay? You're really okay, right?
1000606524.korean: 세이렌 괜찮아? 정말 괜찮은 거 맞지?

1000606526.english: Okay, good luck! Then, goodbye to the iron gate too!
1000606526.korean: 해, 행운을 빌어! 그러면, 철문도 바이바이!

1000606529.english: - The sirens fired multiple times, and when we arrived, the iron gate was hideously crumpled and barely hanging from the cave ceiling.
1000606529.korean: - 세이렌은 포격을 수차례 가했고. 우리가 도착했을 때 철문은 흉하게 &n구겨진 채 간신히 동굴 천장에 매달려 있었다.

1000606530.english: This is the first reason why you should be on good terms with the Navy. Good job, Miss Sirene.
1000606530.korean: 이게 바로 해군과 친하게 지내야 하는 첫 번째 이유죠.&n수고했어요 세이렌 양.

1000606531.english: I'm glad I could be of help, Commander. What do you plan to do now?
1000606531.korean: 도움이 되었다니 기뻐요.&n사령관님? 이제 어떻게 하실 생각이신가요?

1000606532.english: - Finally, the door to Angel's vault opened, and the building revealed its secret interior.
1000606532.korean: - 마침내 앙헬의 금고로 가는 문이 열리고, 그 건물은 그 비밀스러운 내부를 드러냈다.

1000606533.english: Hmm, for a Black River structure, the finish is quite decent.
1000606533.korean: 음, 블랙리버의 구조물 치고는. 제법 괜찮은 마감이네요.

1000606534.english: - ... The surprising thing is that the lighting inside the cave is still working. Who could this cave have been waiting for...
1000606534.korean: - ... 놀라운 점은, 아직도 동굴 내부의 조명이 작동하고 있다는 것.&n이 동굴은 누굴 기다리고 있었던 걸까...

1000606535.english: It is dangerous ahead, Master. May I take charge of your security?
1000606535.korean: 앞은 위험해요. 주인님. 주인님의 경호는 제가 맡아도 될까요?

1000606536.english: Ugh! I don't know what's what anymore either! Let's just go in!
1000606536.korean: 으아~! 나도 이제 뭐가 뭔지 모르겠다! 일단 들어가 보자!

1000606537.english: If it gets too late, I might end up taking everything. Well then, I'm leaving first!
1000606537.korean: 너무 늦으면 내가 다 챙겨버릴지도 몰라. 그럼 나 먼저 간다!

1000606538.english: Ms. Triaina? Don't get ahead of yourself. Oh, come on...
1000606538.korean: 트리아이나씨? 너무 앞서가지 마세요. 아이 참...

1000606539.english: - The moment I approached the entrance of the cave, the lights lined up inside flickered ominously.
1000606539.korean: - 동굴 입구로 다가선 순간, 내부에 늘어선 전등이 불길하게 점멸했다.

1000606540.english: Master!? Please step back. I... here

1000606541.english: I raised my hand and stopped Perrault, who was blocking my path.
1000606541.korean: - 나는 손을 들어 내 앞을 가로막는 페로를 제지했다.

1000606542.english: - I trembled slightly from a pleasure I had never felt before. Even in the midst of that, endless curiosity kept pushing me forward.
1000606542.korean: - 나는 여태 느껴보지 못한 쾌감으로 몸을 살짝 떨었다.&n그런 와중에도, 끝없이 뿜어져 나오는 호기심이 내 등을 계속해서 떠밀었다.

1000606543.english: - So, you're saying humanity's last vault is here?
1000606543.korean: - 그래, 이곳에 인류 최후의 금고가 있다는 말이지?

1000606544.english: - I need to see with my own eyes what on earth is inside this.
1000606544.korean: - 이 안에 대체 뭐가 있는지, 내 눈으로 확인해 봐야겠다.

1000606545.english: No matter how much you think about it, doesn't it seem strange?

1000606547.english: About this Treasure Hunt. Why did they leave us out?
1000606547.korean: 이번 트레저 헌팅 말이야. 어째서 우릴 빼놓은 거지?

1000606548.english: It seems you decided that the Horizon squadron is a good fit for a mission to the beach... Is that strange?
1000606548.korean: 아무래도 해변으로 가는 임무엔 호라이즌 부대가 어울린다고 판단하신 것&n같습니다만… 그게 이상합니까?

1000606549.english: I don't find it particularly strange, but... I don't even like water to begin with.
1000606549.korean: 저도 딱히 이상하진 않습니다만… 애초에 전 물을 좋아하지도 않습니다.

1000606550.english: Tsk. This is why I tell you, people without a sense of romance are hopeless. When it comes to treasure, it has to be pirates, right? How could you leave me out?
1000606550.korean: 쯧. 이래서 로망이 없는 애들은 안 된다니까? 보물하면 당연히 해적이잖니!&n어떻게 날 빼놓을 수 있는 거지?

1000606551.english: … Was that the reason you watched pirate movies all night yesterday? Now I understand why the Commander excluded you from this mission. Such impulses are dangerous.
1000606551.korean: … 어제 밤새도록 해적 영화를 본 게 그것 때문이었습니까?&n사령관 님이 이번 임무에서 빼놓은 이유를 알겠군요. 그런 충동은 위험합니다.

1000606552.english: Hmph, movies are the source of my inspiration. Well, never mind you, Cat, but Valkyrie? What about you?
1000606552.korean: 훗, 영화는 이 몸에게 영감을 주는 근원이라구.&n뭐, 고양이 넌 그렇다치고, 발키리? 넌 어때?

1000606553.english: I don't know what you mean...

1000606554.english: You're the one working the hardest in Orca to begin with. You have the most missions, too. And I heard you even volunteer for sorties?
1000606554.korean: 애초에 오르카에서 제일 고생하는 건 너잖아. 임무 회수도 제일 많구.&n심지어 출격을 자청까지 한다던데?

1000606555.english: Does it make sense to leave me out of such a wonderful summer mission after all that hardship? Just think about it. Being able to go out to sea. Hot sunshine! White sandy beaches! And…
1000606555.korean: 그렇게 고생을 하고 이런 멋진 여름 임무에서 빼는 게 말이 돼?&n생각해 봐. 바다에 나갈 수 있는 거라고. 뜨거운 햇살! 백사장! 그리고…

1000606557.english: Commander, are you sortieing as well?

1000606558.english: heard they'll be coming and going as long as there's no threat? You guys have a captain, right? Captain Leona. What was she talking about again? Something about slathering her body all sticky with some kind of oil...
1000606558.korean: 뭐 위협만 없으면 왔다갔다 할 거라던데? 너희 대장 있지? 레오나 대장.&n뭐라더라? 무슨 오일을 몸에 끈적끈적하게 바를 거라고…

1000606559.english: What is so good about oil? Besides, I don't like noisy places.
1000606559.korean: 기름이 뭐가 좋습니까? 게다가 시끄러운 곳은 싫습니다.
