1000606560.english: It's oil the Commander applies... Cat, do you dislike it? With the Commander's fingers, all the way to your back and butt... sticky...
1000606560.korean: 사령관이 발라주는 기름인데… 고양이 넌 싫어?&n사령관의 손가락으로 등과 엉덩이까지… 끈적끈적…

1000606562.english: If I'm lucky... the front too... Ah, do I have to apply the front myself?
1000606562.korean: 운이 좋으면… 앞에도… 아, 앞은 자기가 발라야 하나?

1000606563.english: ... ... I can't apply it by myself because of the gloves.
1000606563.korean: ... ...&n저, 전 장갑 때문에 혼자 바르는 건 무리입니다.

1000606564.english: Hehe. Then I guess I'll have to ask the Commander to handle the front as well, huh? How about it, Kitty? Still not interested?
1000606564.korean: 후후. 그럼 사령관한테 앞쪽도 부탁을 해야겠네?&n어때? 고양이? 아직도 관심이 없어?

1000606565.english: … Eek… I, I’m not interested, but… it looks like Mr. Werewolf is going to cause some trouble.
1000606565.korean: … 이이익…&n저, 전 관심이 없지만… 아무래도 워울프 씨는 사고를 칠 것 같군요.

1000606566.english: You'll need guards. Understood. I'll go too.
1000606566.korean: 호위병이 필요하겠죠. 알겠습니다. 저도 가기로 하죠.

1000606567.english: Hehe. That's a great decision. Valkyrie? What about you?
1000606567.korean: 후후. 멋진 판단이야. 발키리? 넌 어때?

1000606569.english: Ugh! I-I wasn't imagining anything like that. Besides, Your Excellency, the one you will be applying oil to first is Captain Leona. I'll be after that…
1000606569.korean: 윽! 사, 상상 같은 건 안했습니다.&n애초에 각하께서 오일을 먼저 발라주실 분은 레오나 대장입니다. 전 그 뒤…

1000606570.english: Hehe... I guess I don't even need to ask. Fine. Let's meet here in an hour.
1000606570.korean: 후후… 물어볼 필요도 없겠네. 좋아. 한 시간 뒤에 여기서 만나자구.

1000606571.english: Because I also asked Fortune and Audrey to prepare outfits suitable for the beach.
1000606571.korean: 포츈과 오드리에게도 바닷가에 어울릴 만한 의상을 준비해 달라고 말했으니까.

1000606572.english: Alright, shall I go look for the next member?
1000606572.korean: 자, 난 다음 멤버를 찾으러 가볼까?

1000606573.english: How about it? Doesn't it whet your appetite?

1000606574.english: Exelung! As expected, you are a Werewolf. And did you say that outfit is Buccaneer? Do you like the culture of great France, too? Fine.
1000606574.korean: 엑설렁! 과연, 워울프 공이군. 게다가 그 복장 버카니어라고 했나?&n공도 위대한 프랑스의 문화를 좋아하는 건가? 좋아.

1000606575.english: From now on, I will call the ball Lougaru.

1000606576.english: I don't care about France. However, Captain May was all excited about fireworks and whatnot, too. Yet, all she did was mock me.
1000606576.korean: 프랑스는 아무래도 좋아요. 하지만, 메이 대장도 불꽃놀이니뭐니 하면서&n들떠있더군요. 그러면서 나한텐 비웃는 말만 했다고요.

1000606577.english: “You hate the sea, don’t you?” she said. Without saying a single other word! Why does she think I hate the sea?
1000606577.korean: “넌 바다는 싫어하지?” 라고요. 다른 말은 한 마디도 안 하고!&n어째서 제가 바다를 싫어한다고 생각하는 거죠?

1000606578.english: Is it because of my chest? You mean there isn't a mere lump of fat?
1000606578.korean: 가슴 때문인가요? 그까짓 지방 덩어리가 없다고?

1000606579.english: Whoa whoa... calm down. Anyway, so you're saying Angel is interested too, right?
1000606579.korean: 워워… 진정하라고. 어쨌든 천사양도 관심이 있단 거지?

1000606580.english: Of course. It’s no problem since the mission will be empty for a while anyway due to the abnormal high temperatures.
1000606580.korean: 물론입니다. 어차피 이상고온으로 임무도 한동안 비어 있을 테니 문제없어요.

1000606581.english: I, too, would like to join this adventure. But before that, I’d like to get dressed in clothes suitable for an adventure first…
1000606581.korean: 나 역시 이런 모험에는 함께 하고 싶군. 그것보다&n모험에 어울리는 의복을 먼저 갖추고 싶은데…

1000606582.english: No problem. I've already asked Audrey and Fortune, so they'll contact me soon.
1000606582.korean: 문제없어. 오드리와 포츈에게 이미 부탁은 했으니. 곧 연락이 올 거야.

1000606584.english: So, then… Fortune? Did you hand out the clothes?

1000606585.english: No problem, okay? Audrey said she’s getting the best clothes for each of us for our summer, you know? She’ll be back in a flash, changed, okay?
1000606585.korean: 문제없거든? 오드리가 각자의 여름에 최고로 어울리는 옷을 준비한다고 했거든?&n곧, 옷을 갈아입고 올 거거든?

1000606586.english: Okay. Then… is the preparation almost complete?
1000606586.korean: 좋아. 그럼… 준비가 거의 끝난 건가?

1000606588.english: What, what is this? Why… am I the only one not wearing a bikini?
1000606588.korean: 뭐, 뭐죠? 어째서… 저만 비키니가 아닌 거죠?

1000606589.english: Ah! Night Angel? Miss Audrey told you something about that.
1000606589.korean: 아! 나이트 앤젤? 거기에 대해서 오드리 양이 전한 말이 있거든?

1000606590.english: Night Angel said she's getting a high-leg swimsuit to emphasize her long legs and pretty hips, you know?
1000606590.korean: 나이트 앤젤은 다리가 길고 엉덩이가 예뻐서 그쪽을 강조할 수 있는&n하이레그형 수영복으로 준비를 한다고 했거든?

1000606593.english: … You didn’t mention that earlier? The part about, “Bikinis are dangerous because there’s nothing to catch on”…
1000606593.korean: … 아까 그 말은 안 했네? “걸릴 게 없어서 비키니는 위험해요.”라는 말…

1000606594.english: Yeah... I have a warm heart, you know? Even so, saying such mean things to a Night Angel...
1000606594.korean: 응… 언니 마음은 따뜻하거든? 아무리 그래도 나이트 앤젤에게 그런 못된 말을 하긴…

1000606595.english: Well, I don't think she'll get hurt by that much anymore... Ah! Next up is Valkyrie?
1000606595.korean: 뭐, 쟤는 이제 그 정도로 상처 입을 것 같지는… 아! 다음은 발키리?

1000606596.english: Hehe. I'm also a little nervous now that this outfit is ready.
1000606596.korean: 후후. 저도 이런 복장이 준비되니 조금은 두근두근 합니다.

1000606597.english: Oh~? You look happy. And… what's that bag? Did you bring it again?
1000606597.korean: 호오~? 표정이 좋아 보이네? 게다가… 그 가방은 뭐야? 또 들고 왔어?

1000606598.english: Since it's my first vacation... there are a lot of things to prepare...
1000606598.korean: 아무래도 처음 휴가니… 이것저것 준비를 할 게 많아서…

1000606599.english: I told you it's an adventure, not a vacation... Anyway, it's a relief that the person involved is happy about it.
1000606599.korean: 휴가가 아니라 모험이라니까… 어쨌든 당사자가 좋다니 다행이네.

1000606600.english: Yes... I'll be going now... I'll check my luggage one more time.
1000606600.korean: 네… 전 이만… 짐 확인을 한 번 더 하겠습니다.

1000606601.english: Then, I'll see you when I leave.

1000606603.english: … That looked a bit dangerous from the start…
1000606603.korean: … 저거 처음부터 좀 위험해 보이긴 했는데…

1000606604.english: But… I did my best, too, you know? Charlotte asked me to turn it into a jewel since I was going to do it anyway, you know? Saying she would show me the beauty of France…
1000606604.korean: 하지만… 언니도 최선을 다했거든? 샬럿이 이왕 할 거 보석으로 만들어&n달라고 했거든? 프랑스의 아름다움을 보여주겠다면서…

1000606605.english: Hehe. Both of you are mesmerized by my beauty. Well, it’s not that strange.
1000606605.korean: 후후. 두 사람 다 제 아름다움에 넋을 잃었군요. &n뭐, 이상한 일은 아닙니다.

1000606606.english: For now, she seems to like it. Um... is that swimsuit... okay?
1000606606.korean: 일단 본인은 좋아하네. 저… 그 수영복은… 괜찮아?

1000606607.english: Yes. My beautiful body is fully revealed by this beautiful jewel.
1000606607.korean: 네. 아름다운 보석에 제 아름다운 몸도 충분히 드러나는군요.

1000606608.english: What worries me a little is... that His Majesty has become so captivated by me...
1000606608.korean: 조금 걱정이 되는건… 폐하께서 제게 뇌쇄돼 버리신 나머지...

1000606609.english: Mesmerized by the romantic atmosphere of the seaside… His Majesty could not bear it…
1000606609.korean: 바닷가의 로맨틱한 분위기에… 넋이 나간 폐하가 참지 못하고…

1000606610.english: … Please wait a moment. I'll go to my room.
1000606610.korean: … 잠깐만 기다려 주세요. 전 제 방으로 가겠습니다.

1000606611.english: … Was she always that kind of friend?

1000606612.english: I'm a little embarrassed too, you know? So, all that's left is…
1000606612.korean: 언니도 조금 부끄럽거든? 그럼 이제 남은 건…

1000606613.english: How is it? Does it look okay?

1000606614.english: Wow... you really put some thought into making sure the cat can charm its owner?
1000606614.korean: 워… 고양이가 주인을 꼬실 수 있도록 신경 좀 썼네?

1000606615.english: I think that kind of cute style is the best for our Perrault, you know?
1000606615.korean: 아무래도 우리 페로에겐 저런 귀여운 스타일이 최고거든?

1000606616.english: By the way, is that okay? I mean that cat-shaped hole.
1000606616.korean: 그런데 그거 괜찮아? 그 고양이 모양 구멍 말이야.

1000606617.english: What? Is there a problem with this?

1000606618.english: That part is going to burn up, isn't it? If I show that in front of the commander... a cat's face will appear right in the middle of my chest.
1000606618.korean: 그 부분만 타 버릴 텐데? 사령관 앞에서 그걸 보여주기라도하면…&n가슴 한 중간에 고양이 얼굴이 생기잖아.

1000606619.english: Wh... what are you talking about? Why would I show my chest to my master!
1000606619.korean: 무… 무슨 소릴 하는 겁니까? 제가 주인님께 가슴을 왜 보여줍니까!

1000606620.english: I, I'm leaving! Please call me when you're leaving later!
1000606620.korean: 저, 전 갑니다! 나중에 출발할 때 부르십시오!

1000606621.english: Stop being so coy... Anyway, now that my outfit is ready, shall I get ready too?
1000606621.korean: 내숭 떨긴… 어쨌든 이제 복장도 준비됐고 슬슬 나도 준비를 해볼까?

1000606622.english: Oh my... are you going on an adventure now?

1000606623.english: Of course. I'll gather a few more troops and set off right away.
1000606623.korean: 당연하지. 다른 병력들도 좀 더 모아보고 바로 출발할 거야.

1000606624.english: Just you wait! I'll find the treasure and dump it right in front of the commander.
1000606624.korean: 두고 봐! 내가 보물을 찾아서 사령관 앞에 콱 놔버릴 테니까.

1000606625.english: Make sure Fortune is ready too, because we need to photograph the commander's face then.
1000606625.korean: 포츈도 준비해 두라고 그때 사령관 얼굴은 촬영해야 되니까.

1000606626.english: I'll make you regret leaving this werewolf behind on your adventure!
1000606626.korean: 모험에 이 워울프를 놓고 간 걸 후회하게 해주겠어!

1000606627.english: Werewolf! What is going on! This isn't a seaside, it's a jungle! And on top of that, an AGS! Why did you go out of your way to come to a place where there are hostile AGSs?
1000606627.korean: 워울프! 이게 어떻게 된 겁니까! 바닷가는커녕 정글이지 않습니까!&n게다가 AGS라니! 왜 적대적인 AGS가 있는 곳에 굳이 온 겁니까?

1000606628.english: Perrault, please bear with it a little longer. It will get hotter if you get angry.
1000606628.korean: 페로, 조금만 참으십시오. 화를 내면 더 더워집니다.

1000606629.english: And… as expected, there were no Iron bug…

1000606630.english: Unconditionally shielding them isn't always the best solution. Phew... Anyway, Miss Werewolf, are you sure about the direction?
1000606630.korean: 무조건 감싸주는 게 능사는 아닙니다. 후… 어쨌든 워울프 양, 방향은&n확실한 겁니까?

1000606631.english: Of course. Going this way should be the right path.
1000606631.korean: 물론이지. 이쪽으로 가는 게 맞을 거야.

1000606632.english: I can't believe it. Are you properly learning the Dokdo Act?
1000606632.korean: 믿을 수 없습니다. 독도법은 제대로 익히고 있는 겁니까?

1000606633.english: Dokdo Law? … Ah! I know! Dokdo is the name of an island, right?
1000606633.korean: 독도법? … 아! 알고 있어! 독도라는 게 섬 이름이지?

1000606634.english: So, the fifth fool has appeared in Orca. Miho will be very happy about this, won't she?
1000606634.korean: 오르카에 다섯 번째 바보의 등장이군요.&n미호 양이 아주 좋아하겠는걸요?

1000606635.english: Well, anyway, this island isn't big, so if you keep going, you'll definitely reach the sea.
1000606635.korean: 뭐, 어쨌든 이 섬이 크진 않으니 계속 가다 보면 분명히 바다는 나올 거야.

1000606636.english: Besides, since Angel said she would check the terrain, the jungle will be over soon.
1000606636.korean: 게다가 천사양이 지형을 보고 온다고 했으니 정글은 금방 빠져나오겠지.

1000606637.english: Alright, alright. Let's start getting ready for camping.
1000606637.korean: 자자. 이제 슬슬 야영 준비나 하자고.

1000606638.english: Anyway, shouldn't we have a campfire?

1000606639.english: … Lady Valkyrie? Could you give me one more of that chocolate bar?
1000606639.korean: … 발키리 공? 그 초코바 하나만 더 주겠나?

1000606640.english: I'm sorry. The chocolate bar Miss Night Angel ate earlier was the last one.
1000606640.korean: 죄송합니다. 아까 나이트 앤젤 양이 먹은 초코바가 마지막 초코바였습니다.

1000606641.english: … As expected… I thought it was excessively sweet, but it turns out to be a precious food.
1000606641.korean: … 역시… 지나치게 달콤하다 했더니 귀한 음식이었군.

1000606642.english: No... it was a mistake that Valkyrie and I were the only ones who brought food in the first place. Why didn't anyone prepare food?
1000606642.korean: 아니… 애초에 식량을 싸온 사람이 나랑 발키리 뿐이었다는게 실수였어요.&n어째서 아무도 식량을 준비하지 않은 거죠?

1000606643.english: Ahem! Um... Lord Lougaru said that pirates get their food by hunting... and that they're going to have a barbecue party...
1000606643.korean: 커흠! 그… 루가루 공이 해적들은 식량을 사냥으로 조달한다고…&n바비큐 파티를 할 거라고 들었네만…

1000606644.english: I see. I don't understand. No matter how I look at it, it seems like everyone except me would require a lot of maintenance costs.
1000606644.korean: 그렇군요. 이해가 안 가네요. 아무리봐도 저 빼곤 유지비가 잔뜩 들 것 같은&n몸인데 말이죠.

1000606645.english: Please wait just a moment. Miss Werewolf and Miss Perrault said they would go get some food earlier...
1000606645.korean: 조금만 기다리십시오. 아까 워울프 양과 페로 양이 식량을 구해오겠다고 했으니…

1000606646.english: Right. Lord Lougaru will surely bring in some food. After all, the two of them are wild bioroids.
1000606646.korean: 그래. 루가루 공이 분명히 식량을 구해올걸세. 두 사람은 야성이 있는&n바이오로이드들이니.

1000606647.english: So that we can just light a fire…

1000606648.english: Everyone!!! Everyone!!! Get ready for battle!

1000606650.english: It sounds like the voice of Lord Lougaru...

1000606654.english: Miss Charlotte, it looks like you should prepare for battle.
1000606654.korean: 샬럿 양, 전투를 준비하셔야 할 것 같군요.

1000606656.english: Surely… it’s not going to be a stupid plot where they go hunting and get caught by AGSs… right?
1000606656.korean: 설마… 사냥을 하러 갔다가 AGS들에게 걸렸다… 그런 바보 같은 전개는 아니겠죠?

1000606657.english: It's AGS! Everyone, get ready for battle!

1000606658.english: A fool is given a foolish situation.

1000606659.english: Let's get ready for battle. I'd like to pretend I didn't know anything about how I created this situation, but... that idiot is a precious soldier the Commander cherishes, too.
1000606659.korean: 전투 준비를 하도록 하죠. 이 상황을 만든 걸 생각하면 모른 척하고 싶지만…&n저 바보도 사령관이 아끼는 소중한 병사니까.

1000606660.english: Lord Lougarou! Just wait a little longer! We'll save you!
1000606660.korean: 루가루 공! 조금만 기다리게! 우리가 구해줄 테니!

1000606661.english: The hunt wasn't very difficult. The real problem was the werewolf.
1000606661.korean: 사냥은 크게 어렵지 않았습니다. 그보다 문제는 워울프 양이었죠.

1000606663.english: At least you have some sense of shame. Seeing as you aren't boasting. Let me explain everything to you one by one.
1000606663.korean: 그래도 염치는 있군요. 자랑을 하지 않는 걸 보니.&n하나하나 설명해 드리죠.

1000606664.english: At first, we were lucky enough to spot a wild boar.
1000606664.korean: 처음 우리는 운이 좋게도 멧돼지를 발견할 수 있었습니다.

1000606665.english: Oh! Isn't that a good thing?

1000606666.english: It would have been a good thing if Miss Werewolf hadn't fired the gun.
1000606666.korean: 워울프 양이 총을 쏘지 않았다면 좋은 일이었겠죠.

1000606667.english: Even though I clearly said that I hunt with my claws.
1000606667.korean: 제가 분명히 제 손톱으로 사냥을 한다고 말을 했었는데도 말이죠.

1000606668.english: But why use claws when you have a gun?
1000606668.korean: 하지만, 총이 있는데 어째서 발톱을 쓰는 거지?

1000606669.english: I said use the knife attached to that gun at least! If you shoot from there, isn't it obvious that the AGS will rush at you?
1000606669.korean: 최소한 그 총에 달린 칼을 쓰란 말입니다!&n거기서 총을 쏘면, AGS가 달려드는 게 당연하지 않습니까?

1000606670.english: … Hehe. That’s why I told you young cats are a no-go.
1000606670.korean: … 후후. 이래서 어린 고양이는 안 된다니까?

1000606671.english: When hunting, if I have a gun, which one should I use?
1000606671.korean: 사냥을 할 때, 총이 있으면 뭘 써야하지?

1000606672.english: As expected… is it a gun?

1000606673.english: … Of course, isn't it normal to use a silent weapon?
1000606673.korean: … 당연히 소리가 안 나는 무기를 쓰는 게 정상 아닙니까?

1000606674.english: Of course that’s true… but… hunting is best done with a gun…
1000606674.korean: 물론 그렇긴 하지… 하지만… 사냥은 역시 총으로 하는 게…

1000606675.english: I understand. I have realized it now.

1000606676.english: From now on, I will lead this adventure.
1000606676.korean: 이제부터 이 모험은 제가 이끌도록 하겠습니다.

1000606677.english: What are you talking about! I'm the captain! You can tell just by looking at this hat...
1000606677.korean: 무슨 소리! 선장은 나야! 이 모자만 봐도 확실한데…

1000606678.english: How can you be a captain when there isn't even a boat?

1000606680.english: It is noisy. For your information, Miss Night Angel, Miss Valkyrie, and the other sisters all agreed to this.
1000606680.korean: 시끄럽습니다. 참고로 나이트 앤젤 양과 발키리 양, 그리고 다른 자매들도&n모두 동의한 일입니다.

1000606683.english: That was the original plan, but I was just stripped of my authority for saying I would use a gun for hunting.
1000606683.korean: 원래 그럴 계획이었는데 방금 사냥에 총을 쓴다는 답변으로 권한이 박탈되었습니다.

1000606684.english: Heh... I guess that was a test?

1000606685.english: Isn't that obvious! Our expedition team decided to elect someone with at least a modicum of common sense as our leader.
1000606685.korean: 당연한 것 아닙니까! 우리 탐험대는 최소한의 상식은 가진 사람을 대장으로&n뽑기로 했습니다.

1000606686.english: First, let's sort out the situation.

1000606687.english: First, since we have run out of food, we will send a rescue request to Miss Fortune.
1000606687.korean: 첫 번째, 우린 식량이 다 떨어졌으니 포츈 양에게 구조 요청을 보낼 겁니다.

1000606688.english: Ugh! That goes against the spirit of exploration…

1000606689.english: Second, I will no longer look for the cave leading to where the treasure is. I will ask Miss Fortune for Master's location and head in that direction.
1000606689.korean: 두 번째, 이제 그 보물이 있는 곳으로 가는 동굴은 찾지 않을 겁니다.&n포츈 양에게 주인님의 위치를 물어보고 그쪽으로 갈 겁니다.

1000606691.english: To think they staged a rebellion out of selfish motives…

1000606692.english: You're being too loud, Miss Werewolf. From now on, you're in charge of cooking. Hurry up and butcher that wild boar you caught earlier!
1000606692.korean: 시끄럽습니다. 워울프 양. 앞으로 워울프 양은 요리 담당입니다.&n얼른 아까 잡아온 멧돼지나 손질하세요!

1000606693.english: For your reference, please use only a knife for cleaning. I will not forgive you if you use a gun again.
1000606693.korean: 참고로 손질에는 칼만 쓰도록 하십시오. 또 총을 쓰다간 용서하지 않겠습니다.

1000606694.english: Haha. There's no way you'd use a gun to trim meat!
1000606694.korean: 하하. 고기 손질에 총을 쓸 리가 없지 않나!

1000606695.english: No. I have decided not to let my guard down anymore. First, please detach that bayonet.
1000606695.korean: 아뇨. 전 이제 방심하지 않기로 했습니다. 일단 그 총검을 분리하세요.

1000606697.english: Now, our expedition is going to take a new path. Miss Charlotte, please tell everyone to get ready, as we will have a hearty dinner before we leave.
1000606697.korean: 자, 이제 우리 탐험대는 새로운 길로 갈 겁니다. 샬럿 양, 모두에게 전해주세요.&n저녁을 든든히 먹고 떠날 테니 준비를 하라고요.

1000606698.english: Ah... I'm hungry. We've run out of Spam too... Is the Fortune Tech Center not here yet?
1000606698.korean: 아아… 배고픔다. 스팸도 다 떨어졌는데… 포츈 기술관은 아직임까?

1000606699.english: Please bear with me just a little longer. They will contact you soon. This whole situation started because you all fell for that foolish werewolf's words and dragged me along by force in the first place!
1000606699.korean: 조금만 참아주세요. 곧, 연락이 올 테니. 애초에 워울프 바보 말에 당신들이&n속아서 나까지 강제로 끌고 오는 바람에 생긴 일이잖아요!

1000606700.english: What, really? Otherwise, would we even have a reason to wear summer combat uniforms? Hehe. Wouldn't you like it too, Corporal?
1000606700.korean: 뭐, 그런 말씀을 하심까! 아니면 우리가 하계 전투복 입을 일이나 있겠슴까?&n헤헤. 상병님도 좋지 않슴까?

1000606701.english: When else would I get the chance to wear such revealing clothes? And maybe... even the Commander is smitten by your physique, Corporal...
1000606701.korean: 이런 기회 아니면 이런 야한 옷 언제 입어보겠슴까?&n그리고 어쩌면... 사령관 각하도 상병님 몸매에 반해서…

1000606702.english: Sh-shut up! Colonel Night Angel is here too…
1000606702.korean: 시, 시끄러! 나이트 앤젤 대령님도 계신데…

1000606703.english: I apologize. I will correct it, Colonel.

1000606704.english: It's okay. We're in different units anyway... and rank is just a remnant of the past.
1000606704.korean: 괜찮아요. 어차피 우린 부대도 다르고… 계급이라고 해봤자 그냥 옛날의&n흔적일 뿐이니까요.

1000606706.english: The ranks assigned to us aren't much different from those of military dogs.
1000606706.korean: 우리에게 부여되는 계급은 군견과 크게 다를 것도 없잖아요.

1000606707.english: …because it is the class that will return to once the human world is rebuilt.
1000606707.korean: … 인간 세상이 재건되면 다시 돌아갈 계급이니까요.

1000606708.english: I'm telling you, if they're in different units, there's really no need to worry so much. More than that... what you said earlier is actually bothering me...
1000606708.korean: 부대 다르면 굳이 그렇게 신경 쓸 거 없다니까요.&n그보다… 오히려 아까 그 말이 신경 쓰이는데…

1000606709.english: When we were talking about the figure earlier, you said, “Colonel Night Angel is here too…” right? What did you mean by that?
1000606709.korean: 아까 몸매 이야기를 할 때, “나이트 앤젤 대령님도 계신데…”라고 했죠?&n그건 무슨 뜻인가요?

1000606710.english: Did you perhaps say that thinking, "It would be rude to talk about breasts in front of someone who has nothing"?
1000606710.korean: 혹시 “저렇게 아무 것도 없는 사람 앞에서 가슴 이야기를 하면 실례겠지.”&n이런 생각으로 한 말인가요?

1000606711.english: What? I didn't mean it that way...
1000606711.korean: 네? 전 그런 뜻으로 한 말이 아니라…

1000606712.english: Yes… of course. In military life, honesty often actually gets in the way.
1000606712.korean: 네… 물론 그렇겠죠. 군생활에 솔직함은 오히려 방해가 될 때가 많으니까요.

1000606714.english: Hmph. I told you it's fine. Ah... I guess I should meet up with Colonel Phoenix, who transferred over from our unit, in a bit.
1000606714.korean: 훗. 괜찮다니까요. 아… 좀 있다 우리 부대에서 그쪽으로 옮긴 피닉스&n대령이나 만나봐야겠네요.

1000606715.english: Don't worry about it. I'm just going to chat...
1000606715.korean: 신경 쓰지 마세요. 그냥 잡담이나 하러 가는 거니…

1000606716.english: Ugh... aren't we in big trouble?

1000606717.english: Why did you have to say that... Ah... Colonel Night Angel's story about her chest is going to last a long time...
1000606717.korean: 당신은 왜 그런 말을 해가지고… 아아… 나이트 앤젤 대령님 가슴 이야긴 오래 갈 텐데…

1000606718.english: Colonel Phoenix has a serious temper, you know. If he bashes Sergeant Impet and then Sergeant Efreeti, we…
1000606718.korean: 피닉스 대령 성질 장난 아닌데 말임다. 임펫 중사 까고 이프리트 병장님 까면 우린…

1000606719.english: … There is no other way now. We are going to seduce the Commander with our summer combat uniforms! The closest aide to the supreme leader! Then even Sergeant Efreeti won't be able to touch us.
1000606719.korean: … 이젠 방법이 없슴다. 우리 하계 전투복으로 사령관 각하를 꼬시는 검다!&n최고 권력자의 최측근! 그럼 이프리트 병장님도 우릴 못 건드리지 말임다.

1000606721.english: Don't you realize the atmosphere between Captain Marie and the Commander has been strange lately? Are you suggesting that we, their subordinates, should steal that?
1000606721.korean: 요즘 마리 대장님이랑 사령관 각하 분위기가 묘한 것도 모르나요?&n부하인 우리가 그걸 가로채자고요?

1000606722.english: But, the only room we can live in…

1000606724.english: I don't really know either! It sounds like it's coming from far away...

1000606725.english: This is a big problem! If it makes a sound like this, the AGSs will definitely react.
1000606725.korean: 큰일이에요! 이렇게 소리가 나면 분명히 AGS들이 반응할 거예요.

1000606726.english: Brownie 2,056. Hurry up and tell Miss Perrault that there will be a battle soon.… I will prepare my defenses.
1000606726.korean: 브라우니 2,056. 빨리 달려서 페로 양에게 곧 전투가 있을 거라고 전하세요.&n… 전 방어 준비를 할 테니.

1000606728.english: Phew, we barely managed to defeat them. Thank you, Miss Leprechaun. Thanks to you, we were able to defeat the AGS without any casualties.
1000606728.korean: 후, 겨우 물리쳤군요. 레프리콘 양, 고마워요. 덕분에 희생 없이 AGS를&n물리칠 수 있었어요.

1000606729.english: Honestly… I never knew it would be this hard to have no one around you to trust. Still, everyone I could trust has gone over there…
1000606729.korean: 정말… 주위에 믿을 사람이 없는 게 이렇게 힘들 줄은 몰랐네요.&n그래도 믿을 만한 사람들은 죄다 저쪽으로 가버렸으니…

1000606730.english: Oh, no. On the contrary, I'm glad that all the sisters are safe.
1000606730.korean: 아, 아니에요. 오히려 자매들이 모두 무사해서 다행이에요.

1000606731.english: Well, Miss Charlotte played a big role. After all, there is no other Bioroid here that can match Miss Charlotte's combat power.
1000606731.korean: 뭐, 샬럿 양이 큰 활약을 했죠. 뭐니뭐니해도 전투력 자체는 여기서&n샬럿 양을 따라가는 바이오로이드가 없으니 말이죠.

1000606732.english: Yes… if only there had been a little less romance in her heart, we would all have been at ease.
1000606732.korean: 네… 그 분의 마음 속에 로망만 좀 부족했다면 우리 모두 편했을 텐데요.

1000606733.english: Miss Perrault, then are we marching again?
1000606733.korean: 페로 양, 그럼 다시 행군을 하는 검까?

1000606734.english: Oh, no. Let's camp here for today. I've sent Miss Werewolf out hunting, so our expedition party should be enough for dinner tonight.
1000606734.korean: 아, 아니에요. 오늘은 일단 여기서 야영을 하기로 하죠. 워울프 양에게도&n사냥을 시켜놨으니 우리 탐험단 정도가 오늘 저녁 먹기엔 충분할 거예요.

1000606735.english: The area where Miss Fortune promised to supply food is also nearby. I really hope nothing bad happens...
1000606735.korean: 포츈 양이 식량을 보급해 주기로 한 지역도 이 근처고요.&n부디 별 일이 없어야 할 텐데…

1000606736.english: Ah... is this the spot where Fortune decided to land?
1000606736.korean: 아… 포츈이 상륙하기로 한 지점이 여긴가?

1000606737.english: I think it's probably similar, but... I'm not entirely sure. The satellite map doesn't work properly around here to begin with...
1000606737.korean: 비슷하리라 생각은 하지만 … 확실한 건 모르겠네요. 애초에 이 근처엔&n위성맵이 제대로 작동하질 않아서…

1000606738.english: Hehe. Well, they said they'd let me know when they get nearby, so it shouldn't be a big problem.
1000606738.korean: 후후. 뭐, 근처에 오면 연락을 준다고 했으니 큰 문제는 없겠지.

1000606739.english: More than that... our Lugaru said something cool. He said there is an exercise you absolutely must do when you come to the beach.
1000606739.korean: 그것보다도… 우리 루가루 공이 멋진 말을 해주었지. 해변에 오면 반드시&n해야 할 운동이 있다고 말이지.

1000606740.english: As expected… Charlotte, you remembered? Right. There is a real sport here that only women can play. A sport that only sexy and strong real women can play.
1000606740.korean: 역시… 샬럿, 기억하고 있었네? 그래. 여긴 여자들만 할 수 있는 진짜 스포츠가&n있어. 섹시하고 강한 진짜 여자들만 할 수 있는 그런 스포츠.

1000606741.english: It's only natural to remember the romance. Right... are you ready?
1000606741.korean: 로망을 기억하는 건 당연하지. 그래… 준비는 됐나?

1000606742.english: Huh? What are the two of them talking about? Sports?
1000606742.korean: 응? 두 사람 무슨 말을 하는 건가요? 스포츠?

1000606743.english: Seriously… our Angel doesn’t know anything. You’re not saying you won’t play beach volleyball after coming to the sea?
1000606743.korean: 정말… 우리 천사양은 아는 게 없네.&n설마 바다에 와서 비치발리볼을 하지 않겠단 거야?

1000606744.english: You mean beach volleyball? But is it really okay? Exercising in a situation like this... I’m telling you, Miss Perrault will probably get really angry.
1000606744.korean: 비치 발리볼 말인가요? 그런데 괜찮을까요? 이런 상황에서 운동이나 한다는게… &n페로 양이 아마 화를 많이 낼 거 라고요.

1000606745.english: If it is disgrace received for doing what must be done, I will gladly accept it.
1000606745.korean: 해야 할 일을 하고 받는 불명예라면 기꺼이 받으리.

1000606746.english: As expected of Charlotte. Angel? You don't mean to be lacking confidence? You have the body for jumping, after all.
1000606746.korean: 역시, 샬럿. 천사양? 설마 자신이 없는 거야? 점프를 하기 좋은 몸이잖아.

1000606747.english: Right. The Night Angel wouldn't get hurt every time it jumps like we do...
1000606747.korean: 그래. 나이트 앤젤 공은 우리처럼 점프를 할 때마다 아프지도 않을 텐데…

1000606748.english: … I can't just ignore what you just said. Are you saying you want to play beach volleyball because you're at the beach?
1000606748.korean: … 방금의 말은 흘려들을 수 없군요. &n당신은 비치라서 비치발리볼을 하고 싶단 건가요?

1000606749.english: Bitch? Ah! So it was a pun on "bitch" and "beach volleyball." Wait a minute... Did that bitch say that about me?
1000606749.korean: 비치? 아! 빗치와 비치발리볼을 가지고 한 언어유희였군.&n잠시만… 혹시 그 빗치가 나를 보고 한 말인가?

1000606750.english: You understand quickly for someone who diverted blood meant for the brain to the chest.
1000606750.korean: 뇌에 갈 혈액을 가슴으로 가게 한 분 치고는 이해가 빠르네요.

1000606751.english: I can't forgive you. Watch out. Night Angel won't be able to absorb the shock if hit in the chest.
1000606751.korean: 용서할 수 없군. 조심하게. 나이트 앤젤 공은 가슴에 공을 맞으면 충격 흡수가&n불가능할 테니.

1000606752.english: You should be careful yourself. Make sure you don't hit the chest instead of the ball. Oh, can you receive? You shouldn't be able to see below the chest.
1000606752.korean: 그쪽이나 조심하시죠. 공 대신 가슴을 치지 않도록. 아, 리시브는 되나요?&n가슴 아래가 안 보일 텐데?

1000606753.english: Bring a teammate. Beach volleyball requires two people.
1000606753.korean: 동료를 데리고 오게. 비치발리볼은 두 사람이 필요하니.

1000606754.english: Hehe. I don't need you. I can handle you guys all by myself. Get down and get ready to swallow some sand. Ah, maybe you can't swallow sand?
1000606754.korean: 후후. 필요 없어요. 당신들쯤은 혼자서도 충분하니.&n엎어져서 모래나 삼킬 준비를 하시죠. 아, 모래는 못 삼키려나?

1000606755.english: Even if you fall over, your mouth won't touch the ground.
1000606755.korean: 엎어져도 입이 땅에 안 닿을 테니.

1000606756.english: Hmph! Let's get started right away.

1000606761.english: What? Where is there a law like that?

1000606762.english: You two lost to one person, yet you're talking too much.
1000606762.korean: 둘이서 한 사람한테 진 주제에 말이 많군요.

1000606763.english: No! The way to play beach volleyball with flight equipment in the first place…
1000606763.korean: 아니! 애초에 비행 장비로 비치발리볼을 하는 법이…

1000606764.english: don't think there is a rule in beach volleyball that says you can't play while flying through the air.
1000606764.korean: 비치발리볼 규칙에 하늘을 날면서 하면 안된다는 규칙은 없을 걸요?

1000606765.english: Damn it… Of course, I wouldn’t put nonsensical things in the rules! Then, since there’s no rule against shooting with a pistol, does that mean I can just shoot and win?
1000606765.korean: 젠장… 당연히 비상식적인 짓은 규칙에 안 넣지! 그럼 권총으로 쏘지 말라는&n규칙도 없으니 총으로 쏘고 이기면 되나?

1000606766.english: There's probably a rule against attacking the opposing player. Hehe.
1000606766.korean: 아마, 상대 플레이어를 공격하면 안된다는 규칙은 있을 거예요. 후후.

1000606767.english: Why don't you apologize now? Say, "I'm sorry for acting so arrogant when I'm just a useless lump of fat."
1000606767.korean: 이제 사과나 하시죠.&n쓸모 없는 지방 덩어리나 달고 있는 주제에 우쭐거려 죄송합니다라고.

1000606772.english: W-what! I definitely tied the cat up, so why...
1000606772.korean: 뭐, 뭐야! 고양이는 분명히 묶어 놨는데 어째서…

1000606774.korean: 페로 대장이 우릴 용서하지 않을 걸세!

1000606775.english: Huh? Where did Miss Charlotte and Miss Werewolf go?
1000606775.korean: 응? 샬럿 양과 워울프 양은 어디 가셨죠?

1000606776.english: Hehe. The losers are lying face down, swallowing tears instead of sand. By the way... I heard the two of them tied up Miss Perrault. What is that?
1000606776.korean: 후후. 패배자들은 엎어져서 모래 대신 눈물을 삼키고 있죠.&n그런데… 두 사람이 페로 양을 묶어 놨다고 하던데 그건 뭐죠?

1000606777.english: Yes. Two people attacked me and tied me up with vines, but... I just cut them off with my claws and got out.
1000606777.korean: 네. 두 사람이 절 습격해서 덩굴로 묶어 놓긴 했습니다만…&n그냥 발톱으로 자르고 나왔습니다.

1000606778.english: … I see. But what's going on all of a sudden? Did you get a call from Miss Fortune?
1000606778.korean: … 그렇군요. 그런데 갑자기 무슨 일이죠?&n포츈 양에게서 연락이라도 왔나요?

1000606779.english: Yes. Miss Fortune said that while cruising nearby, she saw a hostile AGS waiting on the coast.
1000606779.korean: 네. 포츈 양이 이 근처로 순항하다가 근처에 적대적인 AGS가 해안에&n대기하고 있는 걸 봤다고 했습니다.

1000606780.english: Then I guess I'll have to clean.

1000606781.english: Yes. That would be necessary... First, Miss Night Angel, please assemble the expedition team.
1000606781.korean: 네. 그래야겠죠.. &n일단 나이트 앤젤 양은 탐험대를 소집해 주십시오.

1000606782.english: Once you meet Miss Fortune, you will be able to breathe a little easier.
1000606782.korean: 일단 포츈 양을 만나면 숨통이 좀 트일 겁니다.

1000606783.english: Big sister is here! How have you been, Perrault? You've been through a lot, haven't you?
1000606783.korean: 언니 왔거든! 우리 페로 잘 있었어? 고생 많았지?

1000606784.english: This is the first time I've been so glad to see Miss Fortune. Oh, please don't hug me. And please don't stroke my head either.
1000606784.korean: 포츈 양이 반가운 적은 처음이네요. 아, 끌어안지 말아주십시오.&n머리도 쓰다듬지 말아 주시구요.

1000606785.english: Hehe. I told you, our Perrault is a shy little thing. More importantly, aren't you hungry? You must have run out of food way back early.
1000606785.korean: 후후. 우리 페로는 부끄럼쟁이라니까.&n그보다, 배는 안 고파? 식량도 일찌감치 다 떨어졌을 텐데.

1000606786.english: Fortunately, Miss Werewolf was good at hunting, so she didn't go hungry.
1000606786.korean: 다행히 워울프 양이 사냥은 잘 해서 굶진 않았습니다.

1000606787.english: Our commander was really worried, too, you know? Hehe. So he gave me special instructions, you know?
1000606787.korean: 우리 사령관도 걱정 많이 했거든? 후후. 그래서 언니한테 특별 지시를 내렸거든?

1000606789.english: Our commander told me to bring Perrault where he is because he said it would be tough. He said we could probably meet him around the cave where the treasure is.
1000606789.korean: 우리 사령관이 페로가 힘들 거라고 자기 있는 데로 데리고 오라고 했거든?&n아마 보물이 있는 동굴쯤에서 만날 수 있을 거라고.

1000606791.english: My sister said that Perrault is looking forward to the Commander applying oil to her, you know? The Commander's face turning red is so cute...
1000606791.korean: 언니가 페로가 사령관이 오일 발라주는 것도 기대하고 있다고 말했거든?&n사령관 얼굴 빨개진 게 얼마나 귀여운지…

1000606792.english: What are you talking about? When did I ever expect anything...

1000606793.english: Right. Right. But since Perrault can't apply oil because of his fingernails... our commander has no choice but to apply it for him, right?
1000606793.korean: 그래. 그래. 그렇지만 페로는 손톱 때문에 오일을 바를 수가 없으니까…&n우리 사령관이 발라줄 수 밖에 없지?

1000606794.english: Uh, it can't be helped. Still... I can't take off my combat gloves while guarding my master...
1000606794.korean: 어, 어쩔 수 없는 일입니다. 그렇다고… 주인님을 호위하는데 전투 장갑을&n벗을 수도 없으니…

1000606795.english: Don't worry. I'm going to guide you now, okay? Just follow along with peace of mind!
1000606795.korean: 걱정 마. 이제 언니가 길을 인도할 거거든?&n안심하고 따라오도록 해요~!

1000606798.english: Artificial structures… To think that something like that exists on this pristine island…
1000606798.korean: 인공적인 시설물… 이 천혜의 섬에 저런 게 있다는 말은…

1000606799.english: Hehe. I think we've found the 'safe'.
1000606799.korean: 후후. 우리가 아무래도 '금고'를 찾은 것 같거든?

1000606800.english: Charlotte, do you happen to like dangerous things?

1000606801.english: Life at the tip of a sword is a continuous series of dangers. Hehe... Is that what you're talking about?
1000606801.korean: 검 끝에서 사는 삶은 위험의 연속이지.&n후후… 그걸 이야기하는 건가?

1000606802.english: It looks like we're on the same wavelength. I told you, good women are dangerous.
1000606802.korean: 마음이 통한 것 같네? 역시 좋은 여자는 위험한 여자라니까.

1000606803.english: Huh? No way you guys... right? It's not what I'm thinking, is it?
1000606803.korean: 응? 설마 너희들… 아니지? 언니가 생각하는 그거 아니지?

1000606804.english: If Fortune notices it, well, I guess it’s something we can do, right?
1000606804.korean: 포츈이 알아차릴 정도라면 뭐, 우리가 해도 되는 행동이겠네?

1000606805.english: If everyone shares the same thoughts, it would be safe to say there is a greater cause.
1000606805.korean: 누구나 같은 생각을 품고 있다면 대의가 있다고 봐도 무방하겠지.

1000606807.english: One is for everyone. Ah, should I say here that the two of us are for everyone?
1000606807.korean: 하나는 모두를 위해. 아, 여기선 우리 둘은 모두를 위해라고 말할까?

1000606808.english: You guys... aren't you going to listen to your older sister?
1000606808.korean: 너희들… 언니 말 안 들을 거니?

1000606809.english: Miss Fortune, there are things a woman must do even at the risk of danger.
1000606809.korean: 포츈 양, 여자는 위험을 무릅쓰고도 해야 할 일이 있지.

1000606810.english: The commander will be happy, too. If the two of us pull it off… we’ll be the greatest contributors.
1000606810.korean: 사령관도 기뻐할 거야. 우리 둘이 해낸다면… 최고의 공로자가 되는 거지.

1000606811.english: Ahem... Then, may I ask Your Majesty for a slightly... excessive reward?
1000606811.korean: 어흠… 그럼 폐하께 조금… 과한 상을 요구해도 되는 건가?

1000606812.english: Why not? Today… the Commander, you, and I, shall we become the Three Musketeers?
1000606812.korean: 왜 안되겠어? 오늘… 사령관과 너, 나 셋이서 삼총사가 되어 볼까?

1000606813.english: Hey, what are you guys talking about? Even I haven't reached that level yet, you know?
1000606813.korean: 너, 너희들 무슨 말을 하는 거니? 그런 건 언니도 아직이거든?

1000606814.english: Ah, no, that's not it... It's dangerous for the two of you to jump in, you know?
1000606814.korean: 아, 그게 아니라… 둘이서 뛰어드는 건 위험하거든?

1000606815.english: Don't worry. We have three knives, so... we can infiltrate very quietly.
1000606815.korean: 걱정 마. 우리에겐 세 자루의 칼이 있으니… 아주 조용히 잠입할 수 있어.

1000606817.english: I'll take care of them one by one as I get out of here quietly.

1000606819.english: Miss Fortune? Is something wrong? What is wrong with your face?
1000606819.korean: 포츈 양? 무슨 일이라도 있습니까? 얼굴이 왜 그렇습니까?

1000606820.english: … This face… looks similar to Captain Khan’s face when Captain Camel and Corporal Warwolf did something stupid.
1000606820.korean: … 이 얼굴은… 카멜 대위와 워울프 상병이 멍청한 짓을 했을 때 칸 대장의&n얼굴과 비슷하군요.

1000606821.english: Seriously… those two are just too much, you know?
1000606821.korean: 정말… 저 둘은 너무한 거 있지?

1000606822.english: They left saying they were going to infiltrate together to get an award from our commander, you know? What should you do if something happens to the two of them?
1000606822.korean: 우리 사령관한테 상을 받겠다고 둘이서 잠입하겠다고 가버렸거든?&n두 사람에게 무슨 일이라도 있으면 언니는 어떻게 해야 해?

1000606823.english: What kind of face are you making when you look at the commander…

1000606824.english: There’s no other choice. Even if it’s dangerous, we have no choice but to attack.
1000606824.korean: 하는 수 없죠. 위험하더라도 공격을 하는 수 밖에.

1000606825.english: … I’ll get the troops ready. As quickly as possible. Before those two fools meet a miserable end.
1000606825.korean: … 병력을 준비시킬게요. 최대한 빠르게.&n두 바보가 처참한 꼴을 당하기 전에 말이죠.

1000606826.english: Are you guys out of your minds? How can you come up with such a stupid idea as to infiltrate with just the two of you?
1000606826.korean: 당신들 제 정신입니까? 어떻게 둘이서 잠입하겠다는 멍청한 생각을 하는 겁니까?

1000606827.english: Well, it went well, just as expected. There was a diversionary effect, too.
1000606827.korean: 뭐, 예상대로 잘 됐잖아. 양동 효과도 있었고.

1000606828.english: It was a wonderful hammer and anvil.

1000606829.english: You're being too loud! What would have happened if you had been defeated one by one?
1000606829.korean: 시끄럽습니다! 각개격파라도 당하면 어떻게 될 뻔했습니까?

1000606830.english: Do you think we'll be defeated that easily?
1000606830.korean: 우리가 그렇게 쉽게 당할 것 같아?

1000606832.english: Besides, we trusted Lord Perrault. Isn't Lord Perrault also a Bioroid bearing the proud name of France? We thought that since we had gone, he would surely support us from behind.
1000606832.korean: 게다가 우린 페로 공을 믿고 있었다네. 페로 공 역시 자랑스러운 프랑스의&n이름을 가진 바이오로이드 아닌가? 우리가 갔으니 반드시 뒤를 받쳐 줄 거라고 생각했지.

1000606833.english: Until then, we were also planning to play it safe.

1000606835.english: In any case, since you have done a good job, I will not make an issue of this any further.
1000606835.korean: 어쨌든 공로를 세웠으니 이 이상 문제를 삼진 않겠습니다.

1000606836.english: If you receive this news… Master will be happy too…
1000606836.korean: 이 연락을 받으면… 주인님도 기뻐하실 테고…

1000606837.english: That is exactly it. I am truly glad to think that His Majesty will be pleased.
1000606837.korean: 바로 그걸세. 폐하께서 기뻐하실 걸 생각하니 정말 기쁘군.

1000606838.english: Then we’ll take a rest. And use up some of the provisions Duke Fortune brought.
1000606838.korean: 그럼 우린 휴식을 좀 취하겠네. 포츈 공이 가지고 온 식량도 좀 축내고.

1000606839.english: If Fortune had any sense, she would have brought alcohol too, right?
1000606839.korean: 포츈이 눈치가 있다면 술도 가지고 왔겠지?

1000606842.english: Come to think of it, I forgot to mention that I was born in Türkiye.
1000606842.korean: 그러고보니 제가 터키 태생이란 말을 못했군요.

1000606844.english: Honestly, there were a lot of incidents, but I feel great that we managed to get the job done without any damage. This is all thanks to Miss Perrault leading us.
1000606844.korean: 정말, 사건도 많았지만 그래도 피해없이 일을 해내니 기분이 좋습니다.&n이게 다 페로 양이 우릴 이끌어준 덕분입니다.

1000606846.english: More importantly, Miss Perrault, what do you intend to ask of the Commander as a reward?
1000606846.korean: 그보다 페로 양, 사령관에게 상으로 뭘 요구할 생각입니까?

1000606847.english: What? What? I don't know what you mean...

1000606848.english: I… after applying oil to Captain Leona, I plan to ask her to apply oil to me in this order.
1000606848.korean: 전… 레오나 대장에게 오일을 발라준 후, 이 순위로 제게 오일을&n발라줄 것을 요구할 생각입니다.

1000606849.english: Yes. Yes. As expected, the wealthy dream of such simple things.
1000606849.korean: 네. 네. 역시 가진 자들은 그런 소박한 걸 꿈꾸는군요.

1000606850.english: What? Then what does Colonel Night Angel intend to ask for…
1000606850.korean: 네? 그럼 나이트 앤젤 대령은 뭘 요구하시려고…

1000606852.english: Plastic surgery? But, Colonel Night Angel. Where would a Colonel even need surgery? You have a beautiful face and a figure...
1000606852.korean: 성형 수술이요? 하지만, 나이트 앤젤 대령. 대령이 수술을 할 곳이 어디 있습니까?&n얼굴도 아름답고 몸매도…

1000606853.english: Don't say any more. Besides, did you say Perrault is asking for a front oil massage?
1000606853.korean: 더 이상 말하지 말아요.&n그보다 페로는 앞면 오일 마사지를 요구한다고 했던가요?

1000606854.english: What the... who is going around spreading such baseless rumors?
1000606854.korean: 그 무슨… 누가 그런 헛소문을 내고 다닙니까?

1000606855.english: I heard it from Miss Charlotte, though? Just so you know, Miss Charlotte said she was going to be part of the Three Musketeers... but I didn't really understand what that meant. And I don't really want to know.
1000606855.korean: 샬럿 양에게 들었습니다만? 참고로 샬럿 양은 삼총사가 된다고 하던데…&n그건 무슨 말인지 모르겠더군요. 그다지 알고 싶지도 않고요.

1000606856.english: That's a lie. More importantly, you two should get some sleep too. I'll handle the security...
1000606856.korean: 거짓말입니다. 그보다 두 분도 슬슬 주무시도록 하세요. 경비는 제가 설 테니…

1000606858.english: If I fall asleep early, I will be able to meet my master sooner. I hope to meet my master tomorrow...
1000606858.korean: 일찍 잠들면 주인님을 더 빨리 만날 수 있을 겁니다.&n내일은 주인님을 만났으면 좋겠군요...

1000606859.english: Hello everyone?! I'm the newly appointed expedition leader! I hope you'll welcome me with a round of applause.
1000606859.korean: 다들 안녕?! 내가 새로 부임한 탐사 대장님이야! 박수로 맞이해주면 좋겠어.

1000606860.english: Clothes?! Where did the previous Triaina expedition leader go?
1000606860.korean: 옷?! 전에 있던 트리아이나 탐사 대장은 어디 갔어?

1000606861.english: Hehe! That one took responsibility for her failure and resigned. Now I am New Triaina! I am the indomitable New Triaina who rose from failure!
1000606861.korean: 헤헤! 녀석은 실패의 책임을 지고 사퇴했다.&n지금의 나는 뉴 트리아이나! 실패를 딛고 일어난 불굴의 뉴 트리아이나지!

1000606862.english: The name stinks. What is New Triaina? What kind of rodent is it?
1000606862.korean: 이름이 구린내가 나요. 뉴 트리아이나는 뭐죠?&n무슨 설치류 이름인가요?

1000606863.english: Let's leave the small stuff aside. Undine. &n Then... Captain! Can we trust the new New Triaina Captain?
1000606863.korean: 사소한 건 접어둬. 운디네.&n그럼... 대장! 새로 오신 뉴 트리아이나 대장님은 믿어도 되는 거야?

1000606864.english: Of course! Haha. Then I'll appoint Nereid, who trusts me, as the deputy expedition leader. How about becoming the deputy expedition leader?
1000606864.korean: 물론이지! 후후. 그럼 날 믿어주는 네레이드를 부 탐사 대장으로 임명해 주지.&n어때? 부 탐사 대장이 되는 건?

1000606865.english: Of course! Ahem! So Neri is a tall person now?
1000606865.korean: 그럼요! 에헴! 그럼 네리도 이제 높은 사람?

1000606866.english: Oh my. Really... You have no manners... You're noisy... And you have no sense of humor. &n But... What's wrong? Why is the radar like this? Is it broken?
1000606866.korean: 어휴. 정말... 교양이 없네요... 시끄럽고... 게다가 사람 보는 눈도 없어.&n그런데... 뭐죠? 레이더가 왜 이러지? 고장 났나?

1000606867.english: Undine, who is not obsessed with honor, must move for a sure detection! Will a signal be picked up from over there? Neri~!! Will you follow me?
1000606867.korean: 명예에 집착하지 않는 운디네는 확실한 탐지를 위해 움직여야겠어요!&n저쪽쯤에 서는 신호가 집힐까? 네리~!! 나 좀 따라와 줄래?

1000606868.english: Oh my, Neri is worried that Undine is a coward. And call her Neri, the captain of the investigation team!
1000606868.korean: 어휴, 네리는 운디네가 겁쟁이라 걱정이야.&n그리고 부탐사대장 네리라고 부르라고!

1000606869.english: Huh? Undine? Where are you going? I heard a strange noise earlier... Did you catch something? &n Oh, you're still leaning on the machine. Trust my instincts! There's no time to hesitate!
1000606869.korean: 응? 운디네? 어딜 가는 거야? 아까 이상한 소리가 나던데... 뭐라도 잡힌 거야?&n참... 여전히 기계에 기대는구나. 내 감을 믿어봐! 우물쭈물할 틈이 없다구!

1000606870.english: Because... I'm a skilled treasure hunter, 'New Triaina'! Let's go quickly!
1000606870.korean: 왜냐면... 난 숙련된 트레저 헌터, '뉴 트리아이나'니까!&n얼른 빨리 출발하자구!

1000606871.english: ...Master? Are you sure it's okay for you to be Triaina?

1000606872.english: - I think I'll leave the way to the vault to Triaina. &n Well, nothing seems too dangerous yet.
1000606872.korean: - 금고까지 가는 길은 트리아이나에게 맡겨볼 생각이다.&n뭐, 아직까진 크게 위험해 보이는 건 없다.

1000606873.english: - Neri's radar did go off, but... well, with such a small signal, they probably aren't a particularly dangerous enemy. We've prepared our troops separately, so we can deploy them if necessary.
1000606873.korean: - 네리의 레이더가 울리긴 했지만... 뭐, 저렇게 작은 신호라면 크게 위험한 적은 &n아닐 것이다. 병력은 따로 준비됐으니 여차하면 투입하면 되겠지.

1000606875.english: Yes? But I'm your cat... bodyguard. Leading the troops...
1000606875.korean: 네? 하지만 저는 주인님의 고양... 경호원입니다.&n병력을 이끄는 건...

1000606876.english: - The excited Orca crew is running wild throughout the cave, making it difficult to control, so we need Perrault's help. And Triaina... Where are you going?!
1000606876.korean: - 흥분한 오르카 인원들이 동굴 여기저기를 들쑤시고 다니는 바람에 통제가&n곤란한 상황이라, 페로의 도움이 필요하다. 게다가 트리아이나... 어디로 가는 거야!

1000606878.english: Oh, of course I know! Something a little shiny... Yeah. Captain's right. Now's not the time to be picking up these little things. Alright! We're going to the vault! Direction... probably this way!
1000606878.korean: 무, 물론 알고 있어! 조금 반짝이는 게.... 그래. 캡틴 말이 맞아. 지금 이런 쬐끄만거&n줍고 있을 때가 아니니까. 자! 우린 금고로 간다! 방향은... 아마도 이쪽!

1000606879.english: ... Certainly, control will be necessary. Understood, Master. I will move with the troops in the rear.
1000606879.korean: ... 확실히 통제가 필요하겠군요. 알겠어요 주인님.&n저는 뒤쪽의 병력과 함께 움직이겠습니다.

1000606881.english: - I'm a bit uneasy about Triaina, who keeps going the wrong way. But I've prepared countermeasures. The Horizon unit will be sufficient as the vanguard.
1000606881.korean: - 자꾸 방향을 틀리는 트리아이나가 불안한 감은 있지만. 대응책은 마련해 두었다.&n선봉대는 호라이즌 부대면 충분할 거고.

1000606883.english: If you're late, you'll only get a small reward. You'd better hurry. &n This captain will gift you with a mountain of gold!
1000606883.korean: 늦으면 조그만 것밖에 없으니까. 서두르는 게 좋아.&n이 대장님이 황금의 산을 너희에게 선물할 테니까!

1000606884.english: New Triaina... I'm a little worried, though...

1000606885.english: Yeah, what do you think? I think it'll be fun.

1000606886.english: Commander, you have to follow along well too. &n If you are having a hard time, tell Neri and she will carry you.
1000606886.korean: 사령관도 잘 따라와야 해. &n만약 힘들면 네리한테 말해 네리가 업어줄 테니까.

1000606888.english: - The Horizon girls chattered and advanced into the cave, and I followed slowly behind them.
1000606888.korean: - 호라이즌의 소녀들은 재잘거리며 동굴 내부로 나아갔고,&n나는 그 뒤를 천천히 따랐다.

1000606889.english: - A huge cave... How long did I walk? I heard someone chasing me from behind, and when I turned around, there was a Sirene.
1000606889.korean: - 거대한 동굴... 얼마나 걸었을까? 뒤에서 타박거리며 따라붙는 소리에&n뒤를 돌아보니 그곳엔 세이렌이 있었다.

1000606890.english: - Sirene looked around and seemed a little nervous.
1000606890.korean: - 주위를 둘러보는 세이렌은 조금 긴장한 듯했다.

1000606892.english: ... I'm... actually a little worried. &n I don't know what might be here...
1000606892.korean: ... 저.... 사실 조금 걱정되긴 해요.&n여기에 뭐가 있을지 모르니까...

1000606893.english: I'm not used to such narrow terrain, so I'm not sure if I can handle it.
1000606893.korean: 이렇게 좁은 지형은 익숙하지 않아서. 제가 잘 대처할 수 있을지 모르겠어요.

1000606894.english: Ah! I see. Then I'll be relieved, Commander.

1000606895.english: - But why is the Sirene following me? Is there something she needs to see?
1000606895.korean: - 그런데 세이렌이 날 따라오는 이유는 뭘까? 볼 일이 있는 걸까?

1000606899.english: Hey~! What are you two doing over there?
1000606899.korean: 어이~! 거기 두 사람 뭐하고 있어?

1000606900.english: Commander. Are you scaring our cutie? &n Hey, how's your little Navy kid?
1000606900.korean: 사령관. 혹시 우리 귀염둥이 겁주고 있는 거야? &n아, 귀염둥이 해군 꼬마도 안녕?

1000606901.english: You're a cutie. Anyway, nice to meet you, Mr. Werewolf.

1000606902.english: - A calm expression, &n The Sirene who had been hesitating until just now returned to her usual Sirene self.
1000606902.korean: - 침착한 표정,&n방금까지 우물쭈물하던 세이렌은 평소의 세이렌으로 돌아왔다.

1000606903.english: By the way... what is that outfit? Modern navy? Pirate? It's a pretty outfit.
1000606903.korean: 그런데... 그 복장은 뭔가요? 근대 해군? 해적?&n예쁜 옷이네요.

1000606904.english: Isn't it?! Isn't it pretty? Thank you, little officer. &n I told you this is a movie prop, so the details are amazing!
1000606904.korean: 그렇지?! 이거 예쁘지? 고마워 꼬마 장교님.&n이게 영화 소품이라 디테일이 살아 있는 게 죽인다니까!

1000606905.english: - War Wolf seems to like being called a pirate. &n Oh, are you happy about the compliments on your clothes?
1000606905.korean: - 워울프는 해적이라 불리는 게 마음에 드는듯하다.&n아, 옷의 칭찬에 기뻐하는 건가?

1000606906.english: But, this older sister is a pirate. She hasn't done anything yet? You wouldn't be thinking of capturing the poor pirate older sister, would you?
1000606906.korean: 그런데, 이 언니가 해적이긴 한데. 아직 성과가 없거든?&n너 설마... 불쌍한 해적 언니를 잡아갈 생각은 아니겠지?

1000606907.english: Haha. If the Commander tells you to arrest him, you have to arrest him, right?

1000606908.english: What? Ahhh~! How can you be so cute? &n From now on, you'll be hanging out with your sister. A pirate's prisoner! How is it? Isn't it cool?
1000606908.korean: 뭐? 아아~! 어쩜 이렇게 귀엽지?&n넌 지금부터 언니랑 다니는 거야. 해적의 포로! 어때? 멋지지?

1000606911.english: -War Wolf's attention has turned to Sirene. &n That's good.

1000606913.english: - Drinking aside, War Wolf is also a great soldier. It would be nice to have various experiences with War Wolf this time.
1000606913.korean: - 음주를 제외하면, 워울프도 훌륭한 군인이다.&n이번 기회에 워울프와 다양한 경험을 해 보는 것도 좋겠지.

1000606914.english: - Since experience is important for officers, I hope you'll take this opportunity to interact with members of other units...
1000606914.korean: - 장교는 경험이 중요하니까, 이번 기회에 타 부대원들과 교류를...

1000606915.english: Knock knock knock... My eyes sting, Mr. Werewolf...

1000606916.english: Whoa~ Commander, were you watching? Voyeurism? No way! Sirene! Let's go far away. &n We're going on a love run!
1000606916.korean: 워~ 사령관 보고 있었어? 관음증? 안되겠어! 세이렌! 우리 멀리 가버리자.&n사랑의 도피를 떠나는 거야!

1000606917.english: - War Wolf made a lame joke and dragged Sirene away. She must have liked Sirene. Sirene's feelings... are unknown.
1000606917.korean: - 워울프는 시답잖은 농담을 던지며 세이렌을 끌고 사라졌다.&n세이렌이 마음에 든 것이겠지. 세이렌의 마음은... 알 수 없지만.

1000606918.english: - Well then, what we need to think about next is...
1000606918.korean: - 그러면, 자, 다음에 생각해야 할 게...

1000606921.english: Deputy Exploration Captain Neri! Reconnaissance results! There were no problems. What a shame!
1000606921.korean: 부 탐사 대장 네리! 정찰 결과! 아무 문제 없었습니다. 안타깝네요!

1000606922.english: Oh, right! I detected an AGS signal, but it seemed weaker than Neri's, so I just ignored it! &n We'll meet again in about 10 minutes! I'll see you at Neri-Neri!
1000606922.korean: 아, 맞아! AGS 신호가 감지됐지만, 네리보다 약해 보여서 그냥 무시했습니다!&n앞으로... 10분쯤 더 가면 만날 겁니다! 네리네리 보고 끝!

1000606923.english: - Neri's characteristic confidence and curiosity are great advantages in battle, but she doesn't seem to be well-suited for reconnaissance missions. I guess I'll have to prepare the main force.
1000606923.korean: - 네리 특유의 자신감과 호기로움은 전투엔 큰 장점이지만,&n역시 정찰 임무엔 잘 어울리지 않는 것 같다. 아무래도 본대를 준비시켜야겠군.

1000606925.english: Is this a battle? I understand, my lord.

1000606926.english: Is it a fight? Then of course Neri Neri has to go too.

1000606927.english: Just tell me the shooting direction, and Neri will clean it up for you in a cute and neat way.
1000606927.korean: 사격 방향만 불러줘. 그럼 네리가 귀엽고 깔끔하게 정리해줄 테니까.

1000606928.english: Master. This way. &n Miss Undine? Did you find something?
1000606928.korean: 주인님. 이쪽으로. &n운디네 양? 뭘 좀 찾았나요?

1000606929.english: Belle! I found a great one! These earrings are truly masterpiece! Hmm... This color... I think it would suit you, Mr. Perrault! Mr. Perrault!
1000606929.korean: 벨르! 좋은 걸 찾았어요! 이 귀걸이 정말 마뉴픽!&n흠... 이 색은... 페로 씨에게 어울릴 것 같군요! 페로 씨!

1000606930.english: Here it is! Mr. Perrault, what do you think of this? &n Don't you think it would be really cute if Mr. Perrault were to wear it?
1000606930.korean: 여기 있군요! 페로 씨, 이거 어떤가요? &n페로 씨가 끼면 정말 귀여울 것 같지 않아요?

1000606931.english: I, I'm enough like this. &n And please don't hug me like that!
1000606931.korean: 저, 전 이대로도 충분합니다.&n그리고 그렇게 껴안지 말아 주세요!

1000606932.english: Don't hesitate, come here. I'm confident in my boots. Here, this...
1000606932.korean: 빼지 말고 이리 와보세요.&n제가 부티엔 자신 있다구요. 자 이걸...

1000606933.english: Huh? Mr. Perrault? I have a question... Mr. Perrault, which ear is... Really...? &n Huh? Is this it?
1000606933.korean: 어? 페로 씨? 여쭤볼 게 있는데... 페로 씨는 어느 귀가... 진짜...?&n응? 이건가?

1000606936.english: You don't like Perrault. Can you just give me that instead of Perrault?
1000606936.korean: 페로가 싫대잖아. 그냥 페로 대신에 그거 나 줄래?

1000606937.english: You? You usually said you didn't like it even when I dressed you up like that. &n Seeing all these pretty things, have you started to feel like it now? Has our Neri finally become a girl?
1000606937.korean: 네가? 평소엔 그렇게 꾸며준다고 해도 싫다더니.&n예쁜 것들을 보니, 이제 그럴 마음이 생긴 거야? 드디어 우리 네리가 소녀가 된 거야?

1000606938.english: No, no~ Neri will melt it down and use it as bullets. Silver bullets will be useful when a werewolf appears. Neri-Neri, a vampire hunter who fires silver bullets! It'll be cute and cool!
1000606938.korean: 아니 아니~ 네리는 그걸 녹여서 탄알로 쓸 거야. 은탄은 늑대 인간이 나타나면 쓸모가 있을&n테니까. 은탄을 난사하는 흡혈귀 사냥꾼 네리네리! 귀엽고 멋있을 거야!

1000606939.english: What?! Did you hear something strange from Mr. War Wolf again? I won't give it to you! Melting this piece of art! I thought you'd never get another present.
1000606939.korean: 뭐라고?! 또 워울프 씨에게 이상한 소릴 들은 거야? 절대 안 줘!&n이런 예술품을 녹이다니! 너한테는 앞으로 선물 같은 거 없을 줄 알어.

1000606940.english: Huh! Get off me~ Trigger Happy Sailor Suit!
1000606940.korean: 훠이! 저리 떨어져~ 트리거해피 세일러 복!

1000606941.english: Huh? Why are you angry? Does the Commander have any idea? Is Undine narrow-minded? Neri is always worried.
1000606941.korean: 응? 왜 화를 내지? 사령관은 짐작 가는 게 있어?&n운디네는 마음이 좁아서 그런 걸까? 네리는 늘 걱정이야.

1000606942.english: Oh, right! I have to go report to the new expedition leader! &n Then, Commander, wait a minute. We'll go ahead.
1000606942.korean: 아 맞다! 뉴 탐사대장에게 보고를 하러 가야지! &n그럼 사령관 좀 있다 봐. 우리 먼저 가 있을게.

1000606943.english: - I exchanged a greeting with Neri and passed the remains of the AGS. Forward... forward.
1000606943.korean: - 네리와 손인사를 나누고, AGS들의 잔해를 지나친다. 앞으로.. 앞으로.

1000606944.english: - If you look around here a little, you can see piles of gold coins and unidentified antiques carelessly piled up here and there.
1000606944.korean: - 여긴 조금만 둘러보면, 곳곳에 금화 더미와 정체불명의 골동품 따위가 무심하게&n쌓여있는 걸 확인할 수 있다.

1000606945.english: - There's no room for gold in the safe... How much important stuff does the safe store?
1000606945.korean: - 금고에 금이 들어갈 자리가 없다니... 금고는 대체 얼마나 중요한 걸 보관하고 있는 걸까?

1000606946.english: Hey, Commander. Are you busy right now?

1000606947.english: Commander, I have a favor to ask. When you return to Orca, could you lend me Sirene? I'd like to take you to the bar.
1000606947.korean: 사령관. 나 부탁 있어.&n있지, 오르카로 복귀하면 세이렌 좀 빌려주면 안될까? 바에 데려가고 싶어서 그래.

1000606948.english: - I came to my senses at War Wolf's words.

1000606949.english: - You and Sirene are going to a bar together? &n ... Hmm... Back then... Something happened with War Wolf...
1000606949.korean: - 세이렌과 둘이서 바에 간다고? &n... 흠... 내가 그때.... 워울프랑 무슨 일이 있었더라...

1000606950.english: - ... Memories filled with the scent of alcohol flashed through my mind.
1000606950.korean: - ... 알코올 향 가득한 추억이 내 머리를 스쳐 지나갔다.

1000606951.english: Oh my~? Hehe... I think I know what our commander was thinking, but don't misunderstand. I'm not really into 'that kind of' stuff~.
1000606951.korean: 어머~? 후후... 우리 사령관이 뭘 떠올렸는지 알 것 같은데,&n오해하면 곤란해. 나 '그쪽' 취향은 아니야~.

1000606952.english: Well then, since we're here, how about the three of us go together? It'll be a unique experience for the three of us. Hey, Sirene, say something. Isn't it hard to be a good girl every day? Have you ever heard of the Three Musketeers?
1000606952.korean: 그럼, 이렇게 된 김에 셋이서 함께 가는 건 어때? 셋이서 색다른 경험을 하는 거지.&n저기, 세이렌도 말 좀 해봐. 매일 착한 소녀 하려면 힘들지 않아? 삼총사라고 혹시 들어 봤어?

1000606954.english: Hmm... You're really not going to allow it...?
1000606954.korean: 흐응... 정말 허락 안 해줄 거야...?

1000606955.english: - The wolf clung tenaciously, but I absolutely could not allow it. &n ... I must leave this place quickly...
1000606955.korean: - 워울프는 끈질기게 달라붙었지만, 절대로 허락할 수 없다.&n... 빨리 이 자리를 벗어나야…

1000606958.english: Huh? A sound? I didn't hear it?

1000606959.english: Speaking of guard bots, they're a bit noisy to begin with. &n It must have been known that we just fought.
1000606959.korean: 가드봇들 말하는 거면, 쟤넨 원래 조금 시끄럽긴 하지.&n방금 우리가 싸운 건 알려졌을 거야.

1000606960.english: No, it's clearly different from the typical AGS startup sound...
1000606960.korean: 아닙니다. 일반적인 AGS의 기동음과는 분명히 다른...

1000606961.english: Hey~. Why are you so worried? Whatever appears, we can just shoot them first, right? The AGSs weren't that bad earlier...
1000606961.korean: 에이~. 뭘 그렇게 걱정하는 거야. 뭐가 나타나든 간에, 우리가 먼저 쏴버리면 되는 거잖아?&n아까 AGS들도 별거 아니던데...

1000606962.english: If possible, it's best to resolve this without using the gun... &n It's done. If you talk to Miss War Wolf, I think that simple mindset will catch on.
1000606962.korean: 가능하면 그 총을 쓰지 않고 해결하는 게 가장 좋습니다만...&n됐습니다. 워울프 양과 대화를 하고 있으면, 그 단순한 사고방식이 옮을 것 같습니다.

1000606963.english: - Perrault shook her head, as if tired of talking to War Wolf, and approached me.
1000606963.korean: - 페로는 워울프와의 대화가 질린 듯 고개를 젓고, 내게 다가왔다.

1000606964.english: Master? Would you allow me to guard you? I'm starting to feel uneasy.
1000606964.korean: 주인님? 제가 경호할 수 있게 허락해 주시겠어요?&n아무래도 불안한 생각이 듭니다.

1000606966.english: - What is that sound that Perrault heard?

1000606967.english: - If it were me, I would have raised the alert level right away, but this time I decided to wait and see the situation a little longer. It doesn't seem dangerous yet.
1000606967.korean: - 평소의 나라면, 곧장 경계 단계를 올렸을 테지만, 이번에는 상황을 좀 더 지켜보기로 했다.&n아직까진 위험해 보이진 않으니까.

1000606968.english: Alright! Let's go! Sirene, come here quickly.
1000606968.korean: 자! 본대 출발이요! 세이렌도 얼른 이리 와.

1000606969.english: Yes? Yes. Where are you holding me! Please don't drag me like that! Save me! Commander!
1000606969.korean: 네? 네. 어딜 잡는 거예요! 그렇게 끌지 말아 주세요!&n구해 주세요! 사령관 님!

1000606970.english: - Quite some time has passed since Orca's men entered the cave.
1000606970.korean: - 오르카의 인원들이 동굴에 진입한 뒤로, 시간이 제법 흘렀다.

1000606971.english: - As the initial tension subsided, groups began to form that built friendships with each other.
1000606971.korean: - 최초의 긴장감이 옅어지자, 서로간의 친분을 쌓는 그룹도 생겨나기 시작했다.

1000606972.english: - The group next to me would be a good example.
1000606972.korean: - 내 옆의 그룹이 좋은 예시라 할 수 있겠지.

1000606973.english: Haha... isn't our Sirene really cute?

1000606974.english: I thought the Duke of Lugaru was only interested in strong women, but... is that your style?
1000606974.korean: 루가루공은 강한 여성에게만 관심이 있는줄 알았건만,&n혹시... 그쪽 취향인가?

1000606975.english: No way! You're the one who doesn't know. There were three Musketeers? Think about it carefully.
1000606975.korean: 그럴 리가!&n너야말로 모르는 게 있어. 삼총사가 세 명이었어? 잘 생각해 봐.

1000606976.english: ... Ah! My fault! There were definitely four of them... since there was D'Artagnan.
1000606976.korean: ... 아! 내 불찰이었군!&n삼총사는 분명히... 네 명이었지. 달타냥이 있으니.

1000606977.english: I wonder what you two are talking about...
1000606977.korean: 저는 두 분이서 무슨 말을 하시는지...

1000606978.english: Hmm~. Dad's here? Okay. I'll do it moderately. Moderately. By the way, Sirene?
1000606978.korean: 으음~. 아빠가 오셨네? 알았어. 적당히 할게 적당히.&n그나저나, 세이렌?

1000606979.english: Okay. Would you like this? I think it would suit you well.
1000606979.korean: 자. 이것 받을래? 너한테 잘 어울릴 것 같은데?

1000606980.english: - War Wolf took a large jewel out of her pocket and handed it to Sirene.
1000606980.korean: - 워울프는 주머니에서 큼지막한 보석을 꺼내, 세이렌에게 내밀었다.

1000606981.english: Oh? Isn't that a jewel? The size, the craftsmanship—there's nothing to fault with it. The Lugaru Duke must have put a lot of effort into it.
1000606981.korean: 호오? 그건 보석이 아닌가? 크기, 세공 상태, 무엇 하나 흠 잡을 것 없어.&n루가루 공이 꽤 신경을 썼군.

1000606982.english: Um... why are you giving this to me?

1000606983.english: - Sirene seemed taken aback by the unexpected gift.
1000606983.korean: - 세이렌은 의외의 선물을 받고 당황한듯 보였다.

1000606984.english: Hmm? Why? Do you not like jewels?
1000606984.korean: 음? 어째서라니? 보석이 마음에 들지 않는겐가?

1000606985.english: Haha! That's not it, Charlotte. Sirene isn't used to this kind of thing yet.
1000606985.korean: 후훗! 그게 아냐 샬럿. 세이렌은 아직 이런게 익숙하지 않아서 그래.

1000606986.english: This is a 'gift' I'm giving you because I want to befriend Sirene. I wanted to give you some delicious rum, but I'm sure the Commander will get in the way.
1000606986.korean: 이건 내가 세이렌과 친해지고 싶어서 주는 '선물'이야.&n생각 같아선 맛 좋은 럼주를 주고 싶었지만. 사령관이 방해할게 분명해서 말이야.

1000606988.english: Ahh~. A gift? Come to think of it, Charlotte used to be bombarded with gifts... &n The dressing room was filled with unopened gift boxes, leaving no room to step. What a fleeting glory!
1000606988.korean: 아아~. 선물인가? 그러고보니 옛날의 샬럿들은 선물 공세를 받았었더라고 하더군..&n포장도 뜯지 못한 선물 상자들로 발디딜 곳 없던 분장실이여. 덧 없는 영광이여!

1000606989.english: ...You want to be friends with me...

1000606990.english: - Sirene was reluctant to accept the jewel.
1000606990.korean: - 세이렌은 선뜻 보석을 받지 못하고 있었다.

1000606992.english: Hoho! If I keep this, what more could I do than bet and get robbed by the Doctor? It's a hundred times better to give it to a cute Sirene.
1000606992.korean: 후후! 내가 이걸 갖고 있어봐야, 내기를 하다가 닥터에게 털리기 밖에 더 하겠어?&n귀여운 세이렌에게 선물하는 게 백배는 낫지.

1000606993.english: ...Thank you so much. It's a beautiful gem.

1000606995.english: Commander? Charlotte? What should I do? I'm so happy I could collapse~. &n After I marry the Commander... Should I just adopt him?
1000606995.korean: 사령관? 샬럿? 어떻게 하지? 나 행복해서 쓰러질것 같아~.&n사령관과 결혼한 뒤에... 확 입양해 버릴까?

1000606996.english: Haha. Come here. I'll calm you down. And Your Majesty, I'll be your wife. Haha.
1000606996.korean: 후후. 이리 오게. 내가 진정시켜 주겠네.&n그리고 폐하의 정실은 날세. 후후.

1000606997.english: What are you talking about? You're not interested in women! Don't hug me with that soft thing... Hmm... Now that I think about it, the Commander seemed to be quite interested in that soft thing...
1000606997.korean: 뭐라는 거야? 여자엔 관심 없다고! 그 푹신한 걸로 날 안으려...&n흠... 그러고보니 사령관이 그 푹신한 거에 관심이 많았던 것 같은데...

1000606998.english: Hmm? Why? Is His Majesty interested in me?
1000606998.korean: 음? 왜 그러지?&n폐하께서 내게 관심이 있다고?

1000606999.english: Haha. Me... Charlotte? I'm here. There's something I've always wanted to steal... &n No. There's something I really want to receive from Charlotte...
1000606999.korean: 후후. 저... 샬럿? 나 있지. 예전부터 훔치고 싶던...&n아니. 샬럿에게 꼭 받고 싶은게 있는데...

1000607000.english: You want to receive it? What is that? And more importantly, what is the interest?
1000607000.korean: 받고 싶다니. 그게 뭔가?&n그것보다 관심은 무슨 이야기지? 그게 중요해.

1000607001.english: There's that... that... that... jewel. If you give him one of those jewels, he'll naturally know that you're interested, right?
1000607001.korean: 그거 있잖아... 그거... 그... 보석 말야.&n그 보석을 하나 주면 사령관이 관심을 보인 걸 자연스럽게 알게될걸?

1000607002.english: Jewels? What does that mean? Where are my jewels...
1000607002.korean: 보석? 그게 무슨 말인가? 내게 보석이 어디...

1000607003.english: Haha, are you pretending not to know? It's right there. The one you carry around like a charm. The big one, I mean.
1000607003.korean: 후후, 모르는척 하기야? 거기 있잖아. 보란 듯이 달고 다니는거.&n큼지막한 그거 말야.

1000607004.english: Um, surely... this is what the Lord Lugaru is talking about?
1000607004.korean: 음, 설마... 루가루공이 말하는건... 이것 말인가?

1000607005.english: No... This must be it... Hehe, is Your Majesty interested in this?
1000607005.korean: 아니... 이게 틀림 없겠지... 후후, 폐하께서 여기에 관심이 있으시단 말이지?

1000607006.english: - Charlotte lowered her eyes and pointed at 'them' with an elegant gesture, and the decorations on her body sparkled and swayed.
1000607006.korean: - 샬럿이 눈을 내리깔고, 우아한 몸짓으로 '그것'들을 가리키자,&n몸에 달린 장식들이 반짝이며 흔들렸다.

1000607007.english: To be exact, it's under the jewel... &n Hehe... There are three... So how about one... Isn't it okay?
1000607007.korean: 정확히는 보석 아래지만...&n후후... 세개나 있으니... 하나 정도는 어떻게... 괜찮지 않아?

1000607008.english: Hmm... If my soul sister says so. There's nothing I can't do... &n Hehe. Your Majesty's gaze has changed.
1000607008.korean: 흐음... 영혼의 자매가 그렇게 말한다면. 못해줄 것도 없다만...&n후후. 폐하의 눈빛이 변하셨군.

1000607009.english: Which one... should I remove to make the Three Musketeers possible?
